photo_BICreekFrost.jpg.title: Bodie Island Creek in Frost
photo_BICreekFrost.jpg.description: A serene creek in the early morning, surrounded by frost-covered grasses and shrubs. The water is calm, reflecting the pale blue sky and the silhouettes of the surrounding vegetation. The frost on the grasses and bushes adds a delicate, icy texture to the scene.

ill_sunsetnearstumpypoint.jpg.title: Sunset Near Stumpy Point
ill_sunsetnearstumpypoint.jpg.description: Silhouetted bare trees stand tall against a vibrant sunset sky, painted with hues of orange, pink, and purple. The scene captures the tranquil beauty of twilight, with the trees forming a stark contrast against the colorful backdrop.

ill_rainonpuddle.jpg.title: Rain on Puddle
ill_rainonpuddle.jpg.description: Raindrops shimmer on the surface of a deep blue puddle, creating a delicate pattern of ripples and reflections. The scene is bathed in soft, diffused light, suggesting a calm, overcast day. The water's surface is alive with tiny bubbles, hinting at the gentle movement beneath.

ill_duneburger.jpg.title: Dune Burger
ill_duneburger.jpg.description: A vibrant red and white roadside stand labeled "Dune Burger" offers hot dogs, chicken, and ice cream under a bright blue sky. A woman in a black dress and a man in a white shirt stand at the counter, while a red car is parked nearby. The scene is bathed in the warm light of a sunny day, suggesting a relaxed, summery atmosphere.

ill_liveoakroses.jpg.title: Live Oak & Wild Roses
ill_liveoakroses.jpg.description: A live oak tree with sprawling branches and vibrant pink wild roses blooms against a backdrop of a clear blue sky. The sunlight filters through the leaves, casting dappled shadows on the ground. The scene captures the essence of a sunny day in a natural setting, highlighting the beauty of the tree and its blossoms.

ill_carnival.jpg.title: Carnival!
ill_carnival.jpg.description: A carnival at dusk, with illuminated rides and tents glowing against a twilight sky. People are gathered, enjoying the festivities. The scene is vibrant with colorful lights and dynamic shapes, capturing the lively atmosphere of a fairground.

ill_shark.jpg.title: Shark
ill_shark.jpg.description: A close-up view of a shark's textured skin, revealing intricate patterns and ridges, bathed in clear, rippling water. The image captures the shark's textured surface in detail, with the water's gentle ripples adding a dynamic texture to the scene.

ill_crabs.jpg.title: Crabs
ill_crabs.jpg.description: A dense pile of blue crabs fills the frame, their green shells and blue-tipped claws creating a textured, overlapping pattern. The crabs are tightly packed, showcasing their natural form and vibrant colors. The image captures a moment of abundance and the raw beauty of marine life.

ill_beachfishing.jpg.title: Beach Fishing
ill_beachfishing.jpg.description: Six anglers stand in shallow ocean water, casting their lines into the waves under a bright, partly cloudy sky. The scene is bathed in the warm, golden light of late afternoon, casting long shadows and highlighting the sandy beach and frothy surf. The anglers, dressed in casual fishing gear, are focused on their rods, creating a peaceful yet active moment of beach fishing.

ill_bonnets.jpg.title: Scotch Bonnets
ill_bonnets.jpg.description: A close-up of numerous small, light-colored seashells, tightly packed together, bathed in the warm, golden light of what appears to be late afternoon sunlight. The shells vary slightly in shape and size, creating a textured, organic pattern. The scene evokes a sense of calm and natural beauty, reminiscent of a beach setting.

ill_currlight.jpg.title: Currituck Light in Snow - B&W
ill_currlight.jpg.description: A snow-covered tree stands in the foreground, its branches bare and covered in a light layer of white. Behind it, a brick building with a white roof and a chimney is partially obscured by the tree. The building appears to be a small, quaint structure, possibly a shed or a small house. The scene is set in a snowy environment, with the ground and the tree covered in snow, suggesting a cold, wintry day.

ill_kidsumbrella.jpg.title: Kids & Umbrella
ill_kidsumbrella.jpg.description: Three children walk along a sandy beach under a large blue and white umbrella. The ocean waves crash behind them, and the sky is a vibrant blue with scattered white clouds. The scene is bathed in bright, natural sunlight, suggesting a midday moment of leisure and fun.

ill_stairs.jpg.title: Currituck Lighthouse Stairwell
ill_stairs.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a clear blue sky, casting a long shadow on the lush green lawn below. The lighthouse is surrounded by a white house with a red roof and a porch, and a weeping willow tree adds a touch of elegance to the scene. The setting sun bathes the entire area in a warm, golden light.

ill_wright.jpg.title: Wright Memorial & 1903 Flyer
ill_wright.jpg.description: A golden hour scene captures the Wright Memorial & 1903 Flyer atop a grassy hill, bathed in the warm, fading light of sunset. The monument stands tall against a sky painted with hues of purple and orange, casting long shadows over the golden grass. Visitors are silhouetted against the monument, adding a sense of scale and human presence to the serene landscape.

ill_fishingocracoke.jpg.title: Beach Fishing at Ocracoke
ill_fishingocracoke.jpg.description: At sunset, the golden light bathes a beach where a lone figure walks past a line of parked vehicles, their silhouettes stretching along the shore. The water reflects the warm hues of the sky, creating a shimmering path that leads to the horizon. Birds fly in the distance, adding life to the tranquil scene.

le_angelwing.jpg.title: Angel Wing
le_angelwing.jpg.description: A close-up of a white, ribbed shell partially submerged in foamy, bubbly water. The shell's texture is detailed, with a series of ridges running along its length, and the surrounding water is frothy with bubbles, suggesting a recent wave or current. The lighting is soft and diffused, likely from an overcast sky, casting a gentle glow on the scene.

photo_springrenewal.jpg.title: Spring Renewal
photo_springrenewal.jpg.description: A family of Canada geese glides across a calm, rippling pond, their reflections shimmering on the water's surface. The scene is bathed in the soft, golden light of early morning, casting long shadows and highlighting the muted greens and browns of the surrounding vegetation. The geese and their goslings move gracefully, creating gentle ripples in the water as they navigate the tranquil setting.

photo_blackskimmerssunrise.jpg.title: Black Skimmers at Sunrise
photo_blackskimmerssunrise.jpg.description: A flock of black skimmers is captured in mid-flight over a serene beach at sunrise. The birds are silhouetted against the golden hues of the early morning light, creating a striking contrast. The ocean waves gently roll onto the shore, and the sky is painted with soft, warm colors, suggesting a peaceful and tranquil moment.

photo_CLsnowytrees.jpg.title: Currituck Light Through Snowy Trees
photo_CLsnowytrees.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a clear blue sky, casting a long shadow on the lush green lawn below. The lighthouse is surrounded by a white house with a red roof and a porch, and a weeping willow tree adds a touch of elegance to the scene. The setting sun bathes the entire area in a warm, golden light.

photo_footbridgecorolla.jpg.title: Footbridge in Corolla
photo_footbridgecorolla.jpg.description: A snow-covered wooden footbridge spans a calm river, its rustic structure partially obscured by a blanket of white. The bridge is flanked by a wooden fence, also dusted with snow, and is surrounded by snow-laden trees and bushes. The scene is serene and quiet, with the gentle sound of water flowing beneath the bridge.

photo_swansundersunset.jpg.title: Swans Under the Sunset
photo_swansundersunset.jpg.description: A flock of swans gracefully flies against the backdrop of a setting sun, casting a warm, golden glow over the scene. The birds' silhouettes are sharply defined against the vibrant orange and yellow hues of the sky, with dark silhouettes of trees in the distance. The moment captures the serene beauty of nature at dusk.

photo_seaoatsmoonlight.jpg.title: Sea Oats and Moonlight
photo_seaoatsmoonlight.jpg.description: A serene beach scene with sea oats swaying gently in the breeze, their green and yellow hues contrasting with the sandy shore. The sky is a brilliant blue, dotted with fluffy white clouds, suggesting a calm, midday atmosphere. The horizon stretches far into the distance, meeting the sea in a tranquil expanse.

photo_summerstormsouth.jpg.title: Summer Storm Sweeping South
photo_summerstormsouth.jpg.description: A vast expanse of sandy beach stretches towards the horizon under a dramatic sky filled with swirling, dark clouds. The ocean waves gently lap at the shore, and a lone lifeguard chair stands sentinel against the backdrop of the impending storm. The light suggests early morning or late afternoon, casting a soft, diffused glow over the scene.

photo_spidersmarsh.jpg.title: Spider's Marsh
photo_spidersmarsh.jpg.description: Spider webs shimmer in the golden light of a sunrise, suspended above a field of tall grasses. Mist drifts through the air, adding a dreamy quality to the scene, while the sun casts a warm, golden hue over the landscape.

photo_newfoalcurrbeach.jpg.title: New Foal on the Currituck Beach
photo_newfoalcurrbeach.jpg.description: A mother horse and her foal graze peacefully on the sandy dunes of Currituck Beach, with the ocean waves crashing in the background. The golden light of late afternoon bathes the scene in warm tones, highlighting the rich brown of the horses' coats and the vibrant green of the grass. The image captures a tranquil moment of nature's simplicity and beauty.

photo_threeotters.jpg.title: Three Otters in Alligator River Refuge
photo_threeotters.jpg.description: Three otters float serenely on the surface of a calm body of water, their dark fur contrasting with the light blue and white ripples around them. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting a peaceful morning or late afternoon. The otters appear relaxed, their heads and backs visible above the water, creating a tranquil and intimate moment.

photo_oldchurchwindow.jpg.title: Old Church's Window
photo_oldchurchwindow.jpg.description: A weathered window frame reflects a twilight sky, with silhouetted tree branches and a hint of distant hills. The glass is cracked, revealing a fragmented view of the outside world, while the interior is dimly lit, suggesting the photo was taken during dusk.

phish_swansbluegold.jpg.title: Swans in Blue and Gold
phish_swansbluegold.jpg.description: A flock of trumpeter swans gracefully takes flight over a serene body of water, their wings spread wide against a backdrop of other swans resting on the surface. The scene is bathed in the soft, golden light of either sunrise or sunset, casting a warm glow over the entire scene.

photo_lightningJP.jpg.title: Lightning at Jennette's Pier
photo_lightningJP.jpg.description: A view from beneath a wooden pier, with sunlight streaming through the beams, casting a warm, golden glow. Waves crash against the pier's base, creating white foam. The scene evokes a sense of calm and the passage of time.

photo_CHabove.jpg.title: Cape Hatteras From Above
photo_CHabove.jpg.description: An aerial view of Cape Hatteras, showcasing a long, sandy peninsula curving into the ocean. The coastline is bordered by a mix of green vegetation and sandy beaches, with gentle waves lapping against the shore. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a calm, sunny day.

photo_sandhillcraneBIL.jpg.title: Sandhill Crane at Bodie Island Light
photo_sandhillcraneBIL.jpg.description: A sandhill crane stands gracefully in shallow water, its long legs and curved neck reflecting in the calm surface. The crane's brown feathers contrast with the vibrant green grass and blue water, creating a serene scene. The light suggests a bright, sunny day.

photo_refugegator.jpg.title: Alligator River Refuge Gator
photo_refugegator.jpg.description: An alligator rests on a log in a calm river, its reflection mirroring its form in the water. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting early morning or late afternoon. The alligator's textured skin and the surrounding trees create a serene, natural setting.

photo_newgirl.jpg.title: New Girl
photo_newgirl.jpg.description: A chestnut-colored horse and its dark foal walk along the edge of the ocean, their hooves splashing in the shallow waves. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, highlighting the horses' coats and the gentle motion of the water. The setting appears to be a beach, with the horses moving in harmony with the rhythm of the sea.

photo_shipwreckstars2.jpg.title: Shipwreck Under The Stars #2
photo_shipwreckstars2.jpg.description: A shipwreck rests on a sandy beach under a starry night sky, its silhouette illuminated by the soft glow of distant lights. The Milky Way stretches across the dark blue canvas, creating a serene and timeless scene.

photo_seamonster.jpg.title: Sea Monster
photo_seamonster.jpg.description: A powerful wave crashes with force, its crest curling and breaking into a spray of white foam. The sun casts a warm, golden light over the scene, highlighting the raw energy of the ocean. The wave's dynamic motion and the misty spray create a dramatic and intense moment.

photo_swansonwing.jpg.title: Swans on the Wing
photo_swansonwing.jpg.description: Two trumpeter swans glide gracefully against a clear blue sky, their wings spread wide and feathers shimmering in the sunlight. The scene captures a moment of serene flight, with the swans' black-tipped beaks and dark-tipped tail feathers contrasting sharply against the bright white of their plumage.

photo_marshgrasses2020.jpg.title: Marsh Grasses
photo_marshgrasses2020.jpg.description: Marsh grasses sway gently in the breeze, their slender, golden-green blades creating a textured, flowing pattern. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting an overcast day or early morning. The scene evokes a sense of calm and natural beauty.

photo_airshow3.jpg.title: Air Show #3
photo_airshow3.jpg.description: A biplane soars through a fiery explosion, its wings adorned with checkered flags. The scene is set against a backdrop of trees and a clear sky, with the sun casting a warm light on the fiery spectacle. The moment captures the intensity and drama of an airshow performance.

photo_greenturtle.jpg.title: Green Turtle
photo_greenturtle.jpg.description: A green turtle rests partially submerged in shallow, foamy water, its patterned shell and head visible above the surface. The scene is bathed in natural light, suggesting a daytime setting, with the turtle appearing calm and at ease in its aquatic environment.

photo_cubscrossingcanal.jpg.title: Cubs Crossing the Canal
photo_cubscrossingcanal.jpg.description: Two young black bear cubs, their dark fur glistening, cautiously step across a weathered log spanning a calm, reflective canal. The lush greenery of reeds and trees flanks the water, bathed in the soft, diffused light of a late afternoon. The cubs' small, tentative steps suggest a moment of exploration and learning.

photo_OLstars6.jpg.title: Ocracoke Light and Stars #6
photo_OLstars6.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands illuminated against a starry night sky, framed by the branches of a large tree. The scene is bathed in the soft glow of the lighthouse, casting a warm light on the surrounding foliage and creating a serene, almost magical atmosphere.

photo_OLstars15.jpg.title: Ocracoke Light and Stars #15
photo_OLstars15.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands illuminated against a starry night sky, framed by the branches of a large tree. The scene is serene and timeless, with the light casting a warm glow on the structure and the tree's leaves silhouetted against the dark sky. The stars twinkle brightly, adding a sense of wonder and tranquility to the image.

photo_mattamuskeetsunrise1.jpg.title: Mattamuskeet Sunrise #1
photo_mattamuskeetsunrise1.jpg.description: A serene sunrise bathes a cluster of bare trees in golden hues, their silhouettes standing tall against a gradient sky transitioning from soft orange to pale blue. The sun, low on the horizon, casts long shadows and illuminates the scene with a warm, tranquil light.

photo_roughsurfsmoothwater.jpg.title: Rough Surf in Smooth Water
photo_roughsurfsmoothwater.jpg.description: A powerful ocean wave curls and breaks, its surface a mix of white froth and deep green hues, illuminated by bright sunlight. The wave's intricate patterns and the spray of water suggest a dynamic and energetic moment in the sea.

photo_CLatnight.jpg.title: Currituck Light at Night
photo_CLatnight.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a clear blue sky, casting a long shadow over a well-maintained lawn. The lighthouse is surrounded by lush greenery and a historic-style house with a wraparound porch. The scene is bathed in the soft, warm light of early morning or late afternoon, highlighting the textures of the grass and the lighthouse's brickwork.

photo_irisescanal.jpg.title: Irises in a Canal
photo_irisescanal.jpg.description: A cluster of purple iris flowers with yellow centers bloom amidst lush green foliage, their delicate petals gently swaying in the breeze. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting a calm morning or late afternoon. The irises are in full bloom, creating a vibrant and serene garden setting.

photo_captmike.jpg.title: Capt. Mike at Rest
photo_captmike.jpg.description: A sepia-toned harbor scene features a weathered fishing boat named "Capt. Mike" resting at a dock. The calm water reflects the boat and the overcast sky, creating a serene and nostalgic atmosphere. Other fishing vessels are moored in the background, adding to the maritime setting.

photo_snowliveoak.jpg.title: Snow on Live Oak
photo_snowliveoak.jpg.description: A lone live oak tree stands in a snowy landscape, its branches heavy with fresh snow. The scene is serene and quiet, with the snow blanketing the ground and the tree's leaves. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting an overcast day. The tree's gnarled branches create a striking silhouette against the white backdrop.

photo_piershadowssunrise.jpg.title: Pier and Shadows at Sunrise
photo_piershadowssunrise.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with golden light filtering through clouds and casting a warm glow over the wet sand and gentle waves. The sky is a mix of soft blues and yellows, with fluffy clouds reflecting in the wet sand, creating a tranquil and reflective atmosphere.

photo_stumpyptsunset.jpg.title: Stumpy Point Bay Sunset
photo_stumpyptsunset.jpg.description: A silhouette of a lone tree stands tall against a vibrant sunset, its branches reaching upwards as the sky transitions from deep oranges to soft blues. The horizon is barely visible, lost in the glow of the setting sun, casting long, golden rays that streak across the darkening sky. The scene evokes a sense of solitude and tranquility.

photo_rainbowcurl.jpg.title: Rainbow Curl
photo_rainbowcurl.jpg.description: A powerful ocean wave curls into a dramatic tube, its crest breaking into white foam. A faint rainbow arcs across the wave's face, adding a touch of color to the deep blue and green hues of the water. The scene captures the raw energy and beauty of the sea.

photo_waveafterwave.jpg.title: Wave After Wave
photo_waveafterwave.jpg.description: A surfer rides a powerful, curling wave under a bright, golden sky. The water is a deep blue, and the wave's white foam contrasts sharply with the surfer's dark shorts. Another person is visible in the background, paddling on a surfboard. The scene captures the dynamic energy of surfing in a coastal setting.

photo_shelly1.jpg.title: Shelly Island at Cape Hatteras #1
photo_shelly1.jpg.description: An aerial view of Shelly Island at Cape Hatteras, showcasing a long, narrow sandbar stretching into the deep blue ocean. The island's sandy beach is bordered by patches of green vegetation, and the water transitions from a lighter turquoise near the shore to a darker blue further out. The scene is bathed in natural light, suggesting a time of day when the sun is high but not directly overhead.

photo_OI17_10.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet - 2017 #10
photo_OI17_10.jpg.description: An aerial view of Oregon Inlet, showcasing a narrow strip of land stretching into the ocean, surrounded by vibrant blue waters and patches of green vegetation. The scene is bathed in the soft light of either early morning or late afternoon, casting gentle shadows and highlighting the natural beauty of the coastal landscape.

photo_OI17_14.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet - 2017 #14
photo_OI17_14.jpg.description: An aerial view of Oregon Inlet, showcasing a vibrant turquoise estuary with sandbars and a bridge stretching across the inlet. The scene is bathed in the soft light of early morning or late afternoon, casting gentle shadows and highlighting the natural textures of the sand and water. The bridge, a thin line against the vastness, connects two landmasses, while the estuary's colors transition from deep blue to lighter shades, creating a serene and dynamic landscape.

photo_OI17_24.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet - 2017 #24
photo_OI17_24.jpg.description: An aerial view of Oregon Inlet, showcasing a narrow strip of land stretching into the ocean, with a bridge connecting two parts of the landmass. The water transitions from deep blue to lighter shades near the shore, reflecting the sky and sand. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting a calm, early morning or late afternoon setting.

photo_ribbonsand.jpg.title: A Ribbon of Sand - North of Buxton
photo_ribbonsand.jpg.description: An aerial view of a long, narrow strip of land, bordered by a sandy beach on one side and the vast expanse of the ocean on the other. The land is dotted with vegetation and a road runs along its length, dividing the sandy area from the greenery. The ocean's colors transition from a deep blue to a lighter turquoise, reflecting the sunlight. The sky above is a clear, light blue, indicating a bright, sunny day.

photo_lightningvaca.jpg.title: Lightning Over the Vacationers
photo_lightningvaca.jpg.description: A dramatic scene unfolds as lightning streaks across a dark, purple sky, illuminating the night. Below, a row of houses with warm, glowing windows stands on a sandy beach, their silhouettes stark against the vibrant backdrop. The moment captures the raw power of nature juxtaposed with the quiet, human presence of vacationers.

photo_cloudmtsOI.jpg.title: Cloud Mountains at Oregon Inlet
photo_cloudmtsOI.jpg.description: A long pier stretches across a shallow, sandy inlet under a dramatic sky. Dark, brooding clouds loom overhead, casting a moody light over the scene. The distant mountains, bathed in the soft glow of either sunrise or sunset, provide a serene backdrop to the foreground's textured sand and water. The image captures a quiet, almost contemplative moment in Outer Banks, North Carolina.

photo_jansunrise.jpg.title: January Sunrise
photo_jansunrise.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with the sun casting a warm, golden glow over the ocean and sky. The waves gently lap onto the sandy shore, creating a soft, foamy texture. Wispy clouds are tinged with hues of pink, orange, and purple, reflecting the early morning light. The horizon stretches out, meeting the calm sea under a vast, open sky.

photo_blueheronbass.jpg.title: Blue Heron & Bass
photo_blueheronbass.jpg.description: A great blue heron stands gracefully on a log, its wings slightly spread, as it holds a freshly caught bass in its beak. The scene is bathed in the warm, golden light of either sunrise or sunset, casting a serene glow over the calm water and the reeds lining the shore. The heron's feathers shimmer with shades of gray and white, contrasting beautifully with the golden hues of the setting or rising sun.

photo_sunsetOI2.jpg.title: Sunset at Oregon Inlet #2
photo_sunsetOI2.jpg.description: A tranquil sunset at Oregon Inlet #2 casts a warm, golden glow over the calm waters, reflecting the sky's hues. The foreground features tall, dry grasses swaying gently in the breeze, adding texture and depth to the serene scene. The sky is a tapestry of soft blues, purples, and pinks, with wispy clouds catching the last light of day.

photo_hurrmattsculpt.jpg.title: Hurricane Matthew's Sculpture
photo_hurrmattsculpt.jpg.description: Ripples and lines etched into sand create an intricate, abstract pattern, reminiscent of a natural sculpture. The texture is detailed and organic, suggesting the movement of wind or water over time. The image is in black and white, emphasizing the contrast and depth of the sand's surface.

photo_tropicalskirts.jpg.title: Tropical Storm Outskirts
photo_tropicalskirts.jpg.description: A dramatic tropical storm looms on the horizon, casting a golden glow over the ocean. Waves crash onto a sandy beach, creating white foam as they meet the shore. The sky is filled with heavy, dark clouds, contrasting with the bright, warm light filtering through.

photo_beachNchairs.jpg.title: Beach & Chairs
photo_beachNchairs.jpg.description: Two wooden Adirondack chairs cast long shadows on the sandy beach, facing the ocean where waves gently break against the shore. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting a calm morning or late afternoon. The dunes and grasses frame the chairs, adding a touch of wild beauty to the tranquil setting.

photo_hotsummernight.jpg.title: Hot Summer Night
photo_hotsummernight.jpg.description: A dramatic sky filled with swirling clouds and intense lightning bolts illuminates a dark, urban landscape. The scene captures the raw power of nature against the backdrop of a city, with the lightning casting a fiery glow over the buildings below.

photo_marshfire.jpg.title: Marsh Fire on the Nags Head Causeway
photo_marshfire.jpg.description: A massive plume of smoke rises dramatically from a fire on the horizon, casting a golden hue over the sky and reflecting off the calm waters of a marsh. The scene is set against a backdrop of a partly cloudy sky, with the fire's glow illuminating the smoke and creating a stark contrast with the serene water and docks in the foreground.

photo_windNwave.jpg.title: Wind and Wave
photo_windNwave.jpg.description: A powerful wave crashes with white foam, its crest curling over in a dynamic display of nature's raw energy. The sunlight illuminates the wave, casting a golden hue on its surface, while the surrounding water is a deep, dark blue. The scene captures the moment of the wave's peak, frozen in time.

photo_oceansrainbow.jpg.title: Ocean's Rainbow
photo_oceansrainbow.jpg.description: A seagull soars gracefully near the crest of a powerful, curling wave, its wings spread wide against the backdrop of a vibrant, greenish-blue ocean. The wave, a dynamic swirl of water, is illuminated by the soft, diffused light of either early morning or late afternoon, casting subtle shadows and highlights across its surface. The scene evokes a sense of motion and the raw beauty of the sea.

photo_RMLightSnow.jpg.title: Roanoke Marshes Light in Snowfall
photo_RMLightSnow.jpg.description: A serene sunset bathes a tranquil waterway, casting a golden glow over a wooden pier and a distant lighthouse. The sky transitions from deep orange to a soft yellow, reflecting beautifully on the calm water. Silhouetted buildings line the shore, adding to the peaceful ambiance of this Outer Banks scene.

photo_sunsetreturnOI.jpg.title: Sunset Return at Oregon Inlet
photo_sunsetreturnOI.jpg.description: A tranquil sunset scene at Oregon Inlet, with the sun dipping low on the horizon, casting a warm, golden glow over the calm water. The sky is a tapestry of soft blues and purples, dotted with wispy clouds. In the foreground, tall grasses sway gently, their silhouettes reflected in the still water, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_warmmornpoint.jpg.title: A Warm Morning at The Point
photo_warmmornpoint.jpg.description: A golden beach stretches towards the horizon under a vast sky painted with soft, pastel hues of blue and orange. Gentle waves lap at the shore, reflecting the warm light of a sunrise or sunset. A few people are scattered along the beach, enjoying the tranquil moment. The scene evokes a sense of peace and the beauty of nature.

photo_OI2015_2.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Aerial 2015 - #2
photo_OI2015_2.jpg.description: An aerial view of Oregon Inlet in 2015, showcasing a vibrant interplay of water and land. The image captures the dynamic flow of the inlet, with its rich blues and greens, and the sandy shoreline stretching into the distance. The scene is bathed in natural light, highlighting the textures and patterns of the coastal landscape.

photo_OI2015_3.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Aerial 2015 - #3
photo_OI2015_3.jpg.description: An aerial view of Oregon Inlet in 2015, showcasing a vibrant interplay of water and land. The image captures the dynamic flow of the inlet, with its rich blues and greens, and the sandy shoreline stretching into the distance. The scene is bathed in natural light, highlighting the textures and patterns of the coastal landscape.

photo_OI2015_7.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Aerial 2015 - #7
photo_OI2015_7.jpg.description: An aerial view of Oregon Inlet reveals scattered sandbar islands with sparse green vegetation, divided by waterways displaying deep blue, turquoise, and grayish hues. The scene is bathed in natural light, highlighting the textures and patterns of the coastal landscape.

photo_OI2015_33.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Aerial 2015 - #33
photo_OI2015_33.jpg.description: An aerial view of Oregon Inlet, showcasing a narrow strip of land stretching into the ocean, surrounded by turquoise waters and small islands. photo_OI2015_43.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Aerial 2015 - #43

The scene is bathed in the soft light of early morning or late afternoon, casting gentle shadows and highlighting the natural beauty of the coastal environment.

photo_OIoceansde.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet - Ocean Side
photo_OIoceansde.jpg.description: An aerial view of a coastal inlet, showcasing a vibrant blue-green water body with a sandy beach on the right. Two boats leave trails of white foam as they navigate the waters, creating a dynamic and lively scene. The sky is clear with a few scattered clouds, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_waterlily.jpg.title: Water Lily
photo_waterlily.jpg.description: A single white water lily blooms amidst a cluster of large, vibrant green lily pads on a calm pond. The lily's delicate petals and yellow center stand out against the dark water and surrounding foliage, creating a serene and natural scene.

photo_CLinspring.jpg.title: Currituck Light in Spring
photo_CLinspring.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a clear blue sky, casting a long shadow on the lush green lawn below. A white house with a red roof and porch is nestled beside it, surrounded by blooming trees and bushes. The scene is bathed in the soft light of early morning or late afternoon, highlighting the vibrant colors of the landscape.

photo_waterspoutatoregoninlet.jpg.title: Waterspout at Oregon Inlet
photo_waterspoutatoregoninlet.jpg.description: A waterspout stretches dramatically from the sky, its cylindrical form descending towards the ocean. The scene is set against a backdrop of fluffy white clouds and a bright blue sky, with the waterspout casting a shadow on the water below. The image captures the moment just as the waterspout begins to dissipate, with the sun casting a warm glow on the scene.

photo_sunriseattheouterbankspier.jpg.title: Sunrise at the Outer Banks Pier
photo_sunriseattheouterbankspier.jpg.description: A serene sunrise bathes the sky in golden hues, casting a warm glow over the ocean and reflecting off the wet sand of a beach. The clouds are thick and dramatic, with streaks of sunlight piercing through, creating a tranquil and picturesque moment at the Outer Banks Pier.

photo_stumponcoquinabeach.jpg.title: Stump on Coquina Beach
photo_stumponcoquinabeach.jpg.description: A large, weathered tree stump protrudes from the ocean, its rough bark and jagged edges contrasting sharply with the flowing, blue waves around it. The scene is bathed in the soft, diffused light of either early morning or late afternoon, creating a serene and contemplative mood. The water's surface is a vibrant blue, with streaks of white foam trailing behind the stump, suggesting a gentle current.

photo_snowonjockeysridge2.jpg.title: Snow on Jockey's Ridge #2
photo_snowonjockeysridge2.jpg.description: Snow blankets the dunes of Jockey's Ridge, creating a serene and undulating landscape under a pale blue sky. The light is soft and even, suggesting a time close to sunrise or sunset. Sparse grasses peek through the snow, adding texture and a touch of life to the otherwise pristine white scene.

photo_snowonjockeysridge1.jpg.title: Snow on Jockey's Ridge #1
photo_snowonjockeysridge1.jpg.description: Snow blankets the dunes of Jockey's Ridge, creating a serene and undulating landscape under a pale blue sky. The light is soft and even, suggesting a time close to sunrise or sunset. Sparse, dry grasses peek through the snow, adding texture and contrast to the scene.

photo_nagsheadsunrise.jpg.title: Nags Head Sunrise
photo_nagsheadsunrise.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with golden light filtering through clouds and casting a warm glow over the wet sand and gentle waves. The sky is a tapestry of soft blues and yellows, with fluffy clouds reflecting in the wet sand, creating a tranquil and reflective atmosphere.

photo_jennettespieratdawn.jpg.title: Jennette's Pier at Dawn
photo_jennettespieratdawn.jpg.description: A wooden pier extends into the ocean at dawn, its structure illuminated by warm, golden lights. The sky is a gradient of blue and orange hues, with scattered clouds adding texture to the scene. The sandy beach stretches out in front, leading to the calm waters of the ocean.

photo_jennettespieraerial.jpg.title: Jennette's Pier Aerial
photo_jennettespieraerial.jpg.description: An aerial view of Jennette's Pier, a long wooden pier extending into the turquoise ocean. The pier is adorned with flags and has a building at its end. The beach below is sandy and dotted with colorful umbrellas and beachgoers. The water is calm, with gentle waves lapping against the shore. The sky is clear, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_jennettespiersunrise.jpg.title: Jennette's Pier & Sunrise
photo_jennettespiersunrise.jpg.description: At Jennette's Pier, a group of fishermen stand silhouetted against the vibrant backdrop of a setting sun. The pier extends into the ocean, its structure partially submerged in the water. The sky is painted with hues of orange and red, casting a warm glow over the scene. The fishermen are equipped with fishing rods, their figures slightly blurred, indicating movement and activity. The water below is calm, reflecting the colors of the sky, and the horizon is clearly visible.

photo_hatteraslightatnight.jpg.title: Hatteras Light at Night
photo_hatteraslightatnight.jpg.description: A tall, black and white striped lighthouse stands illuminated against a darkening sky, casting a warm glow from its lantern. The surrounding area is lush with green grass and trees, and a white fence lines the base of the lighthouse. The scene is set under a dramatic sky with scattered clouds, hinting at the transition from day to night.

photo_crabatsunrise.jpg.title: Crab at Sunrise
photo_crabatsunrise.jpg.description: A small blue crab scurries across a sandy beach, its legs and antennae casting a delicate shadow on the wet sand. The background is a blur of golden light, suggesting the early morning sun reflecting off the water. The scene evokes a sense of calm and the quiet beauty of nature at dawn.

photo_brownhorsegroup.jpg.title: Brown Horse Group
photo_brownhorsegroup.jpg.description: A group of brown horses stands close together on a beach, their manes and tails catching the light. The ocean waves roll in the background, creating a serene and natural setting. The horses appear calm and relaxed, with one foal nestled among them, suggesting a familial bond. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, highlighting the rich brown tones of the horses' coats and the blue of the water.

photo_aerialofnagsheadpier.jpg.title: Aerial of Nags Head Pier
photo_aerialofnagsheadpier.jpg.description: An aerial view of a coastal scene featuring a long pier extending into the turquoise ocean. The pier is surrounded by a sandy beach and a row of houses and buildings along the shoreline. The sky is clear with a few scattered clouds, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_snowyjockridge.jpg.title: Snowy Jockey's Ridge
photo_snowyjockridge.jpg.description: Snow blankets the dunes of Jockey's Ridge, casting long shadows and creating a serene, wintry landscape. Sparse grasses peek through the snow, adding texture and contrast to the pristine white. The light suggests a late afternoon or early evening, with the sun low in the sky, bathing the scene in a soft, golden glow.

photo_capesunlonefish.jpg.title: Cape Pt Sunrise & Lone Fisherman
photo_capesunlonefish.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with golden light filtering through clouds and casting a warm glow over the wet sand and gentle waves. The sky is a tapestry of soft blues and yellows, with fluffy clouds reflecting in the wet sand, creating a tranquil and reflective atmosphere.

photo_engelhardsun.jpg.title: Engelhard Sunrise
photo_engelhardsun.jpg.description: A tranquil marina at sunrise, with the sky painted in hues of orange and pink. Several fishing boats are docked, their masts silhouetted against the vibrant sky. The calm water reflects the colors of the dawn, creating a mirror-like effect. The scene is peaceful and serene, capturing the quiet beauty of early morning in a coastal fishing village.

photo_blueheronHL.jpg.title: Blue Heron and Hatteras Light
photo_blueheronHL.jpg.description: A great blue heron perches gracefully on a gnarled, weathered tree stump, its feathers a blend of blue and gray against the pale sky. The scene is set in a natural, untamed environment, with bare branches and green grasses surrounding the stump. The light suggests a calm, early morning or late afternoon ambiance.

photo_BILnightclouds.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light at Night, with Clouds
photo_BILnightclouds.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a starry night sky, its light illuminating the surrounding area. The sky is dotted with numerous stars and a few wispy clouds, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_BWdock.jpg.title: Dock
photo_BWdock.jpg.description: A black and white image captures a wooden pier extending into the distance, its planks leading the eye towards a small structure at the end. The sky is filled with dramatic clouds, and the sun shines brightly, casting a radiant glow. The scene evokes a sense of solitude and tranquility.

photo_sunrisemanteo.jpg.title: Sunrise in Manteo
photo_sunrisemanteo.jpg.description: A tranquil sunrise bathes the sky in hues of orange and pink, casting a soft glow over a calm body of water. A lighthouse stands on a pier, its silhouette reflected in the still water, while sailboats rest peacefully on the dock. The scene is serene and timeless, capturing the quiet beauty of the Outer Banks.

photo_sanderlingsflight.jpg.title: Sanderlings in Flight
photo_sanderlingsflight.jpg.description: A flock of sanderlings takes flight over the ocean, their wings spread wide against the backdrop of the shimmering sea. The birds' light brown and white plumage contrasts with the deep blue of the water, while the sun reflects off the waves, creating a sparkling effect. The scene captures a moment of dynamic movement and natural beauty.

photo_BILswans.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light & Swans
photo_BILswans.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands prominently against a dramatic sunset sky, its silhouette sharply outlined against the vibrant orange and yellow hues. The sky is filled with billowing clouds, some tinged with the warm glow of the setting sun. Two birds are seen flying in the distance, their silhouettes contrasting against the bright backdrop. The scene is set against a backdrop of trees and a distant horizon.

photo_BILmilky2.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light and Milky Way #2
photo_BILmilky2.jpg.description: A Bodie Island Lighthouse stands tall against a starry night sky, its beacon glowing faintly. The Milky Way stretches across the heavens, creating a celestial backdrop. The scene is serene, with the lighthouse's silhouette and the twinkling stars dominating the frame.

photo_BILplatform.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light From Viewing Platform
photo_BILplatform.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a bright blue sky dotted with fluffy white clouds, casting a warm glow over a wooden boardwalk that stretches into a marshy landscape. The golden grasses sway gently in the breeze, reflecting the light of the lighthouse. The scene is peaceful and serene, capturing a moment of calm in the Outer Banks.

photo_BILsummer.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light in Summer
photo_BILsummer.jpg.description: A tall, black and white striped lighthouse stands prominently against a backdrop of blue sky and scattered clouds. The lighthouse is situated on a grassy field with a small white building attached to its base. The scene is set in a rural area with a white fence in the foreground and some trees in the distance.

photo_BILcreek.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light Over Creek
photo_BILcreek.jpg.description: A serene creek winds through a grassy landscape, bordered by tall golden reeds that sway gently in the breeze. The sky above is a tapestry of soft clouds, bathed in the warm, golden light of either sunrise or sunset, casting long shadows and reflecting off the calm water. In the distance, a lighthouse stands sentinel, its silhouette barely visible against the horizon.

photo_BILstairwell3.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light Stairwell #3
photo_BILstairwell3.jpg.description: A spiral staircase descends into a circular well, its black metal railing contrasting sharply with the white walls. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting an interior space with no direct sunlight. The image captures the intricate details of the staircase and the surrounding architecture, evoking a sense of quiet and timelessness.

photo_BImarshsunrise.jpg.title: Bodie Island Marsh at Sunrise
photo_BImarshsunrise.jpg.description: A serene sunrise bathes a marshy landscape in golden hues, with mist clinging to the water's surface and silhouetted reeds framing the foreground. The soft light casts a tranquil glow over the scene, highlighting the calmness of the early morning.

photo_CLlight1.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Light #1
photo_CLlight1.jpg.description: A tall, black and white striped lighthouse stands prominently against a vibrant sunset sky. The sky transitions from deep blue at the top to warm oranges and yellows near the horizon, with a few wispy clouds scattered across. The lighthouse's silhouette is sharply defined, casting a silhouette against the colorful backdrop.

photo_CLlight2.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Light #2
photo_CLlight2.jpg.description: A classic black and white striped lighthouse stands tall on a sandy beach, its reflection shimmering in the calm waters below. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day. The lighthouse is surrounded by a small, white building with green shutters and a red roof, both nestled in a dune area. The scene is serene and picturesque, capturing the essence of a coastal landscape.

photo_clearingstormRB.jpg.title: Clearing Storm's Rainbow

photo_coquinasunrise.jpg.title: Coquina Beach Sunrise

photo_CL20134.jpg.title: Currituck Light 2013 #4

photo_CL201320.jpg.title: Currituck Light 2013 #20

photo_CLstairwell4.jpg.title: Currituck Light Stairwell #4

photo_currmarshA2.jpg.title: Currituck Marsh Aerial #2
photo_currmarshA2.jpg.description: An aerial view of Currituck Marsh, showcasing a network of winding waterways and lush green wetlands. The scene is bathed in soft, diffused light, suggesting a calm morning or late afternoon. The water reflects the sky, creating a serene and tranquil atmosphere.

photo_daysend2.jpg.title: Day's End at Oregon Inlet #2
photo_daysend2.jpg.description: A serene marina scene at Oregon Inlet, with a row of colorful fishing boats docked under a vast sky dotted with fluffy white clouds. The light suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with soft, diffused sunlight enhancing the tranquil atmosphere.

photo_dinghy1.jpg.title: Dinghy #1
photo_dinghy1.jpg.description: A small dinghy rests peacefully on calm, deep blue water, its reflection mirroring the boat and oars. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting early morning or late afternoon. The wooden dock in the foreground adds a rustic touch, while the distant horizon hints at a serene coastal setting.

photo_dinghy2.jpg.title: Dinghy #2
photo_dinghy2.jpg.description: A small dinghy rests peacefully on calm, deep blue water, its reflection mirroring the boat and oars. The scene is bathed in soft, golden light, suggesting early morning or late afternoon. The wooden dock in the foreground adds a rustic touch, while the distant shoreline with palm trees hints at a tropical or coastal setting.

photo_dunesatsunset.jpg.title: Dunes at Sunset
photo_dunesatsunset.jpg.description: Golden grasses sway gently in the breeze along a sandy beach at sunset, casting long shadows and reflecting the warm hues of the sky. The dunes stretch into the distance, meeting the horizon where the ocean meets the twilight.

photo_dunescapeHI.jpg.title: Dunescape on Hatteras Island
photo_dunescapeHI.jpg.description: Golden sea oats sway gently in the breeze on a sandy beach, their delicate fronds catching the light of a bright, partly cloudy sky. The ocean stretches out in the distance, its surface shimmering under the sunlight. The scene is bathed in the warm glow of a late afternoon, casting long shadows across the dunes.

photo_E2moonrise.jpg.title: Elizabeth II & Moonrise
photo_E2moonrise.jpg.description: A ship, illuminated by warm, golden lights, rests on calm waters under a night sky. The moon rises faintly in the background, casting a soft glow and creating a reflection that mirrors the ship's silhouette. The scene is serene and evocative, capturing a quiet moment of maritime beauty.

photo_E2rainbow.jpg.title: Elizabeth II & Rainbow
photo_E2rainbow.jpg.description: A wooden sailing ship with two masts rests at a dock under a vibrant double rainbow arching across a clear blue sky. The setting sun casts a warm, golden light over the calm water and the surrounding trees, creating a tranquil and picturesque scene.

photo_fingerlings.jpg.title: Fingerlings
photo_fingerlings.jpg.description: A dense school of fingerlings swims in clear, greenish-blue water, their tiny bodies shimmering in the sunlight. The water's surface ripples gently, reflecting the light and creating a serene, almost ethereal atmosphere. The scene suggests a calm, early morning or late afternoon moment.

photo_fireworks.jpg.title: Fireworks
photo_fireworks.jpg.description: A vibrant fireworks display bursts into the night sky, casting colorful reflections on the calm ocean below. The fireworks' bright, multicolored sparks create a dynamic and festive scene against the dark backdrop of the evening sky.

photo_fishocracoke.jpg.title: Fisherman on Ocracoke
photo_fishocracoke.jpg.description: A silhouette of a fisherman stands on a sandy beach at sunset, casting his line into the ocean. The vibrant orange and yellow hues of the sky contrast with the dark outline of the fisherman and his rod, while another figure is visible in the distance, also fishing. The ocean waves gently lap at the shore, creating a peaceful and tranquil scene.

photo_fishtourn2.jpg.title: Fishing Tournament #2
photo_fishtourn2.jpg.description: A fleet of white fishing boats glides across the calm, blue waters of the Outer Banks, their wakes trailing behind them. The sun casts a bright, even light across the scene, highlighting the boats and the gentle ripples on the water's surface. The horizon stretches far into the distance, dotted with more boats, suggesting a large-scale fishing event.

photo_HLaerial1.jpg.title: Hatteras Light Aerial #1
photo_HLaerial1.jpg.description: A tall, striped lighthouse stands prominently on a grassy, elevated platform, surrounded by a white fence. The lighthouse features alternating black and white stripes, with a red door and window at the base. The ocean stretches out in the background, with waves gently breaking on the shore. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_HLaerial2.jpg.title: Hatteras Light Aerial #2
photo_HLaerial2.jpg.description: A striking black and white striped lighthouse stands tall against a backdrop of a vast, deep blue ocean. The lighthouse is situated on a sandy beach, with lush green vegetation surrounding it. The sky is clear, suggesting a calm and sunny day. A few people can be seen in the distance, enjoying the beach and the ocean waves.

photo_horsesCLL.jpg.title: Horses & Cape Lookout Light
photo_horsesCLL.jpg.description: A horse grazes in a field with a blue and white striped lighthouse in the background. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day. The field is lush and green, and the lighthouse stands tall and proud, casting a serene atmosphere.

photo_JRaerial.jpg.title: Jockey's Ridge Aerial Looking South
photo_JRaerial.jpg.description: An expansive sand dune stretches across the frame, its undulating surface marked by natural ridges and sparse vegetation. In the distance, a coastal town nestles along the shoreline, with the calm ocean extending to the horizon. The light suggests a late afternoon or early evening, casting a warm glow over the scene.

photo_JRafternoon.jpg.title: Jockey's Ridge in Afternoon Light
photo_JRafternoon.jpg.description: Golden sunlight bathes the dunes of Jockey's Ridge, casting long shadows and highlighting the vibrant green grasses that cling to the sandy slopes. The sky is a tapestry of soft clouds, painted with hues of blue and orange as the sun sets in the distance.

photo_kiteboardingsound.jpg.title: Kiteboarding on the Roanoke Sound
photo_kiteboardingsound.jpg.description: Kitesurfers glide across the Roanoke Sound, their colorful kites dancing against a bright blue sky dotted with wispy clouds. The ocean reflects the sunlight, creating a shimmering surface. The scene captures the dynamic energy of the sport and the serene beauty of the coastal environment.

photo_merchantsautumn1.jpg.title: Merchant's Millpond in Autumn #1
photo_merchantsautumn1.jpg.description: A serene autumn scene at Merchant's Millpond, with tall cypress trees standing in a calm, mossy pond. The leaves are a vibrant mix of orange and yellow, casting dappled shadows on the water's surface. The light suggests a late afternoon, with the sun low in the sky, bathing the scene in a warm, golden glow.

photo_milkywayoverocracoke.jpg.title: Milky Way Over Ocracoke Beach
photo_milkywayoverocracoke.jpg.description: The Milky Way stretches across the night sky, its countless stars shimmering against a gradient of dark blues and blacks. Below, the calm waters of Ocracoke Beach reflect the celestial display, with a faint glow from distant lights adding a subtle warmth to the scene. The horizon is barely visible, hinting at the vastness of the universe above.

photo_morningglory.jpg.title: Morning Glory
photo_morningglory.jpg.description: Two vibrant purple morning glories bloom amidst a lush green vine, their petals softly illuminated by the gentle light of early morning. The surrounding foliage is dense and verdant, creating a serene and natural setting.

photo_morningskyosprey.jpg.title: Morning Sky and Osprey Nest
photo_morningskyosprey.jpg.description: A serene morning scene captures a vast, calm body of water reflecting a dramatic sky filled with fluffy, white clouds. A solitary osprey nest perches atop a lone, weathered tree stump, its silhouette stark against the tranquil water and vibrant sky. The light suggests early morning, with soft, diffused sunlight enhancing the peaceful atmosphere.

photo_nosetonose.jpg.title: Nose to Nose
photo_nosetonose.jpg.description: Two horses, one brown and one dark, stand nose to nose against a backdrop of blue and white vertical lines, possibly a fence or wall. The scene is captured in a moment of quiet interaction, with the horses' heads close together, suggesting a bond or a moment of connection. The lighting is soft and even, hinting at a daytime setting.

photo_OLkeepershouse.jpg.title: Ocracoke Light & Keeper's House
photo_OLkeepershouse.jpg.description: A white lighthouse stands tall against a clear blue sky, its light beam not visible. Beside it, a white picket fence lines a grassy area leading to a house with a red roof and white walls, featuring large windows and a porch. Trees with full green foliage provide shade, and the scene is bathed in the warm, golden light of late afternoon or early evening.

photo_rainbowspray.jpg.title: Rainbow Spray
photo_rainbowspray.jpg.description: A powerful ocean wave curls and breaks, spraying a vibrant rainbow of colors into the air. The scene is set against a deep blue ocean under a clear sky, capturing the dynamic energy of the sea at what appears to be midday.

photo_rainfire.jpg.title: Rain and Fire
photo_rainfire.jpg.description: A close-up of a spider's web illuminated by a warm, golden light, with strands stretching out in all directions, creating a complex network of lines against a dark background. The intricate details of the web are highlighted by the light, giving it a glowing, almost ethereal appearance.

photo_RIMfog1.jpg.title: Roanoke Island Marsh and Fog #1
photo_RIMfog1.jpg.description: A misty morning on Roanoke Island Marsh, the fog gently lifting to reveal the silhouettes of trees and grasses along the shoreline. The calm water reflects the soft light, creating a serene and tranquil scene.

photo_RIMfog3.jpg.title: Roanoke Island Marsh and Fog #3
photo_RIMfog3.jpg.description: A golden hour bathes a misty marsh, with the sun's rays filtering through the dense foliage of cypress trees. The fog swirls gently, obscuring the distant shoreline and creating a serene, ethereal atmosphere.

photo_RIMfog5.jpg.title: Roanoke Island Marsh and Fog #5
photo_RIMfog5.jpg.description: A misty morning over Roanoke Island Marsh, with low-lying fog hovering over the water and gently lifting off the land. The scene is calm and serene, with the soft light of dawn casting a gentle glow over the landscape. The water reflects the mist and the distant land, creating a mirror-like effect. The foreground features dark silhouettes of trees and shrubs, adding depth to the tranquil scene.

photo_RMLskiff.jpg.title: Roanoke Marshes Light and Skiff
photo_RMLskiff.jpg.description: A serene sunset bathes the sky in golden hues, casting a warm glow over a tranquil waterway. A wooden pier extends into the calm water, its silhouette reflected in the glassy surface. In the distance, a lighthouse stands sentinel against the horizon, its light barely visible in the fading light. The scene is peaceful and timeless, evoking a sense of quiet contemplation.

photo_sandfrost.jpg.title: Sand & Frost
photo_sandfrost.jpg.description: Diagonal ripples of golden sand contrast with the muted gray tones of the surrounding dunes, creating a textured pattern that stretches across the frame. The light suggests a late afternoon or early evening, casting long shadows and highlighting the subtle variations in the sand's surface. The image evokes a sense of tranquility and the natural beauty of a desert landscape.

photo_shellsfence.jpg.title: Shells on Fence - Sepia
photo_shellsfence.jpg.description: A weathered white picket fence adorned with seashells, each shell uniquely shaped and positioned, against a sepia-toned sky. The scene evokes a sense of coastal tranquility and nostalgia, with the soft light suggesting either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_silverlakeskipjack.jpg.title: Silver Lake at Sunset with Skipjack
photo_silverlakeskipjack.jpg.description: A classic wooden sailboat, adorned with a Union Jack flag, rests at a dock under a vibrant blue sky with scattered clouds. The setting suggests a peaceful harbor, likely in the Outer Banks, with other boats and structures faintly visible in the background.

photo_skimboarding.jpg.title: Skimboarding
photo_skimboarding.jpg.description: A skimboarder in teal board shorts rides a vibrant yellow wave, arms outstretched for balance, as water sprays dramatically around him. The scene is bathed in bright sunlight, highlighting the dynamic motion and the vivid colors of the ocean and wave. The setting appears to be a coastal location, possibly Outer Banks or Hatteras, known for such surfing conditions.

photo_sunflower.jpg.title: Sunflower
photo_sunflower.jpg.description: A close-up of a sunflower, showcasing its vibrant yellow petals and the intricate, brown center filled with numerous small florets. The petals are slightly curled at the edges, giving a sense of movement and life.

photo_sunriseNH1.jpg.title: Sunrise in Nags Head #1
photo_sunriseNH1.jpg.description: A silhouette of a grassy plant stretches across the foreground against a vibrant orange and yellow sky, with the sun low on the horizon casting a warm glow over the ocean. A wooden fence lines the bottom edge, adding depth to the scene. The moment captures the serene transition from day to night.

photo_sunsetOI.jpg.title: Sunset at Oregon Inlet
photo_sunsetOI.jpg.description: A serene sunset at Oregon Inlet casts a warm, golden glow over the calm waters, reflecting the sky's hues. The foreground features tall, golden grasses swaying gently in the breeze, adding texture and depth to the tranquil scene.

photo_sunsetcurrituck.jpg.title: Sunset on the Currituck Banks
photo_sunsetcurrituck.jpg.description: A large, bare tree stands silhouetted against a vibrant sunset, its branches reaching out against the fiery orange and red sky. The sun, a brilliant orb of light, is partially obscured by the tree, casting long shadows and creating a dramatic interplay of light and dark. The scene captures the tranquil beauty of a Currituck Banks sunset, with the tree serving as a stark contrast to the warm hues of the sky.

photo_2pelicanswave.jpg.title: Two Pelicans Over Wave
photo_2pelicanswave.jpg.description: Two brown pelicans glide gracefully over a frothy wave, their wings spread wide against a backdrop of turquoise ocean. The scene is bathed in the soft light of early morning or late afternoon, casting a gentle glow on the water and the birds. The pelicans' sleek forms contrast with the dynamic, textured surface of the wave below.

photo_whelksunrise2.jpg.title: Whelk at Sunrise #2
photo_whelksunrise2.jpg.description: A close-up of a whelk shell resting on wet sand, with gentle waves lapping at its base. The shell's warm, earthy tones contrast with the cool, dark sand and the frothy white foam of the receding tide. The light suggests early morning, casting a soft glow on the scene.

photo_winterwaves1.jpg.title: Winter Waves #1
photo_winterwaves1.jpg.description: Raging waves crash against a distant pier under a sky filled with soft, fluffy clouds. The sun casts a warm, golden light across the scene, highlighting the frothy white crests of the waves and the silhouettes of seagulls gliding above. The ocean stretches vast and untamed, with the pier standing as a solitary structure against the dynamic backdrop.

photo_winterwaves2.jpg.title: Winter Waves #2
photo_winterwaves2.jpg.description: Raging waves crash with force, their crests curling and spouting mist into the air. The scene is set against a backdrop of a stormy sea, with the light suggesting either early morning or late afternoon. The waves are a deep blue, contrasting with the white foam of their breaking crests.

photo_wrightaerial.jpg.title: Wright Brothers Monument Aerial
photo_wrightaerial.jpg.description: The Wright Brothers Monument stands tall against a vibrant blue sky dotted with wispy clouds, casting a warm glow over the monument's stone structure. The monument's inscription is clearly visible, and the surrounding area features a paved walkway leading up to it. The setting sun bathes the scene in a golden light, highlighting the monument's details and the expansive sky above.

photo_wrightsunsetsky.jpg.title: Wright Brothers Monument and Sunset Sky
photo_wrightsunsetsky.jpg.description: The Wright Brothers Monument stands tall against a vibrant sunset sky, its white stone structure illuminated by the warm hues of the setting sun. The sky transitions from deep blue to fiery orange and pink, casting a serene glow over the monument and the surrounding paved area. The monument's inscription is clearly visible, honoring the Wright brothers. Two small statues flank the monument, adding to its historical significance.

photo_wrightafternoon.jpg.title: Wright Brothers Monument Late Afternoon
photo_wrightafternoon.jpg.description: The Wright Brothers Monument stands tall against a vibrant sky, its stone structure etched with the names of Wilbur and Orville Wright. The setting sun casts a warm, golden light, highlighting the monument's steps and the surrounding landscape. The sky is a tapestry of soft clouds, painted in hues of blue and orange, creating a serene and historic atmosphere.

photo_yellowwave.jpg.title: Yellow Wave
photo_yellowwave.jpg.description: A golden wave curls gracefully as it breaks, casting a warm, yellow glow across the water's surface. The sky above is a soft pink, suggesting the time is either sunrise or sunset. The scene is serene and evocative of a coastal environment, likely Outer Banks or Hatteras.

photo_springspalette.jpg.title: Spring's Palette
photo_springspalette.jpg.description: A close-up of vibrant yellow and pink tulips gently swaying in a soft breeze, their delicate petals softly lit by the morning sun. The blurred background hints at a field of more tulips, creating a sense of depth and abundance. The scene evokes a feeling of early spring and renewal.

photo_currlens8.jpg.title: Currituck Lighthouse Lens #8
photo_currlens8.jpg.description: A close-up view of a lighthouse lens, showcasing its intricate glass prisms and the warm, golden light emanating from the bulb inside. The lens is encased in a metallic frame, and the surrounding area is bathed in the soft glow of the evening sky, transitioning from blue to hues of orange and pink.

photo_JRatsunset.jpg.title: Jockey's Ridge at Sunset
photo_JRatsunset.jpg.description: Golden sunlight bathes the dunes of Jockey's Ridge at sunset, casting long shadows and highlighting the vibrant green grasses that sway gently in the breeze. The sky is a tapestry of soft clouds, painted with hues of orange, pink, and blue, as the sun dips below the horizon, signaling the end of the day.

photo_thunderclouds.jpg.title: Thunderclouds
photo_thunderclouds.jpg.description: A dramatic cumulonimbus cloud dominates the frame, its fluffy white base contrasting sharply with the deep blue sky. The cloud's textured surface suggests a dynamic weather system, with wispy cirrus clouds trailing behind. The scene is bathed in the soft, diffused light of either early morning or late afternoon, creating a serene yet powerful atmosphere.

photo_BILbluewindow.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light & Blue Window
photo_BILbluewindow.jpg.description: A spiral staircase made of black metal leads upwards, its steps narrowing as it ascends. The walls are painted white, and a large window with blue panes is visible at the top, allowing natural light to filter in. The scene is well-lit, suggesting it is daytime, and the atmosphere is calm and serene.

photo_wavedarksea.jpg.title: Wave on a Dark Sea
photo_wavedarksea.jpg.description: A powerful wave curls and breaks with white foam, its crest forming a dramatic arc against the deep blue of the sea. The light suggests early morning or late evening, casting a soft glow on the water's surface. The scene evokes a sense of raw, untamed nature.

photo_nhpsunrise1.jpg.title: Nags Head Pier at Sunrise #1
photo_nhpsunrise1.jpg.description: A long wooden pier stretches into the ocean at sunrise, its silhouette outlined against a sky painted with hues of orange and pink. Gentle waves lap against the shore, and the American flag waves atop the pier, adding a patriotic touch to the tranquil scene. The light of the rising sun casts a warm glow, reflecting off the water and creating a serene atmosphere.

photo_HLsummernight.jpg.title: Hatteras Light on a Summer Night
photo_HLsummernight.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a starry night sky, its beam cutting through the darkness. The structure is silhouetted against a backdrop of clouds and stars, with the lighthouse's light creating a dramatic and serene scene. The setting suggests a peaceful Outer Banks location, with the lighthouse serving as a beacon in the night.

photo_drifttide1.jpg.title: Driftwood in Tide Wash #1
photo_drifttide1.jpg.description: A piece of driftwood lies partially submerged in the gentle, frothy waves of a beach at sunset. The warm, golden hues of the sky reflect off the water, creating a serene and tranquil scene. The driftwood, weathered and gnarled, contrasts with the smooth, flowing motion of the tide.

photo_drifttide2.jpg.title: Driftwood in Tide Wash #2
photo_drifttide2.jpg.description: A piece of driftwood lies partially submerged in the gentle, frothy waves of a beach at sunset. The warm, golden hues of the sky reflect off the water, creating a serene and tranquil scene. The driftwood, weathered and gnarled, contrasts with the smooth, flowing motion of the tide.

photo_ternsOverCape.jpg.title: Terns Over Cape Point
photo_ternsOverCape.jpg.description: A flock of seagulls soars gracefully over the choppy waves of the ocean, their wings spread wide against a backdrop of a partly cloudy sky. The scene is bathed in the soft light of either early morning or late afternoon, casting a serene yet dynamic atmosphere over the coastal waters.

photo_stormtwilight.jpg.title: Storm Front at Twilight
photo_stormtwilight.jpg.description: A dramatic storm front looms over a sandy beach, casting a dark, brooding shadow over the ocean. The sky is a deep, ominous gray, contrasting with the lighter, almost golden tones of the sand and the greenish-blue hues of the waves. The scene is captured at twilight, with the last light of day barely visible on the horizon, adding a sense of foreboding to the landscape.

photo_greenoceanbreak.jpg.title: Green Ocean Breaker
photo_greenoceanbreak.jpg.description: A seagull soars gracefully near the crest of a powerful, curling wave, its white feathers contrasting sharply against the vibrant green and blue hues of the ocean. The wave, a dynamic swirl of water, is illuminated by the soft, diffused light of what appears to be early morning or late afternoon, casting gentle shadows and highlighting the wave's texture and movement.

photo_jennettestwi1.jpg.title: Jennette's Pier at Twilight #1
photo_jennettestwi1.jpg.description: A serene view under Jennette's Pier at twilight, with the sun casting a golden glow through the wooden beams. Waves gently crash against the pier's sturdy pillars, creating a tranquil and almost ethereal atmosphere. The scene is bathed in a soft, warm light that highlights the textures of the wood and the movement of the water.

photo_whaleclubcorolla.jpg.title: Whalehead Club in Corolla
photo_whaleclubcorolla.jpg.description: A historic clubhouse stands on a waterfront, bathed in the warm glow of a setting sun. The building features multiple chimneys and a prominent roofline, with a large windowed facade. The surrounding area is lush with greenery, and the water reflects the golden light, creating a serene and picturesque scene.

photo_whaleclubbridge.jpg.title: Whalehead Club Bridge
photo_whaleclubbridge.jpg.description: A silhouette of a tree frames a vibrant sunset, where the sun dips low on the horizon, casting a warm, orange glow across the sky. The bridge in the foreground, with its simple wooden railing, is bathed in the soft light of dusk, creating a tranquil and picturesque scene.

photo_snowbeachsunrise.jpg.title: Snowy Beach at Sunrise
photo_snowbeachsunrise.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with golden light filtering through clouds and casting a warm glow over the wet sand and gentle waves. The sky is a tapestry of soft blues and yellows, with fluffy clouds reflecting in the wet sand, creating a tranquil and reflective atmosphere.

photo_snowbeach.jpg.title: Snow On the Beach
photo_snowbeach.jpg.description: Snow blankets the sandy beach, creating a stark contrast with the deep blue ocean and sky. Gentle waves lap at the shore, casting soft shadows on the snow. The scene is bathed in the light of a clear, sunny day.

photo_snowNHwoods2.jpg.title: Snow in Nags Head Woods #2
photo_snowNHwoods2.jpg.description: A serene winter scene in Nags Head Woods, where a winding dirt road meanders through a snow-covered forest. The road is partially covered in snow, with patches of bare earth visible. Tall trees, their branches heavy with snow, frame the scene. A lone deer stands near the road, adding a sense of tranquility and solitude to the winter landscape.

photo_snowNHwoods1.jpg.title: Snow in Nags Head Woods #1
photo_snowNHwoods1.jpg.description: A serene winter scene in Nags Head Woods, where snow blankets the trees and the ground. The reflection of the snowy branches in a pond creates a mirror-like effect, adding to the tranquil atmosphere. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting an overcast day, and the colors are muted, dominated by whites, grays, and subtle hints of orange from fallen leaves.

photo_engelhardV.jpg.title: Engelhard Docks - Vertical
photo_engelhardV.jpg.description: A serene marina scene with several fishing boats docked, their masts and gear reflecting in the calm water. The sky is a clear blue, and the light suggests early morning or late afternoon. The foreground features tall grasses swaying gently in the breeze.

photo_engelhardH.jpg.title: Engelhard Docks - Horizontal
photo_engelhardH.jpg.description: Four white fishing boats with green nets are docked in a calm, reflective waterway under a clear blue sky. The boats are moored near a building with a gray roof, and the scene is bathed in the soft light of early morning or late afternoon, casting long shadows and creating a peaceful, serene atmosphere.

photo_currstallion378.jpg.title: Currituck Wild Stallion #378
photo_currstallion378.jpg.description: A black wild stallion trots gracefully along a sandy beach, its mane and tail flowing in the wind. The ocean stretches out behind, meeting the clear blue sky at the horizon. The light suggests a late afternoon or early evening, casting a warm glow over the scene.

photo_CLsnow20103.jpg.title: Currituck Light in Snow 2010 #3
photo_CLsnow20103.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a clear blue sky, casting a long shadow over a well-maintained lawn. The lighthouse is surrounded by lush greenery and a historic-style house with a wraparound porch. The scene is bathed in the warm light of a sunny day, highlighting the vibrant colors of the landscape and architecture.

photo_CLsnow20101.jpg.title: Currituck Light in Snow 2010 #1
photo_CLsnow20101.jpg.description: A tall, cylindrical lighthouse stands prominently against a clear blue sky, partially obscured by snow-covered branches of bare trees. The lighthouse's structure is detailed, with a small window at the top and a light source visible through a glass dome. The snow on the branches and the lighthouse creates a serene winter scene.

photo_CPsunriseshells.jpg.title: Cape Point Sunrise & Shells
photo_CPsunriseshells.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with golden light filtering through clouds and casting a warm glow over the wet sand and gentle waves. The sky is a mix of soft blues and yellows, with fluffy clouds reflecting in the wet sand, creating a tranquil and reflective atmosphere.

photo_CPaerial2010.jpg.title: Cape Point Aerial 2010
photo_CPaerial2010.jpg.description: An aerial view of Cape Point showcases a narrow sandbar extending into the ocean, with pale tan sand forming its edges and a small inland lagoon near the center. The surrounding waters transition from deep blue on the right to emerald green on the left, where gentle waves create white frothy patches, and scattered clouds drift across the bright blue sky. Bright, even sunlight suggests midday, illuminating the textures of the sand and the varied blues of the sea.

photo_CLreflectionH.jpg.title: Currituck Light & Reflection - Horizontal
photo_CLreflectionH.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall in the distance, its silhouette framed by the branches of a large tree. The sky is a gradient of blue, transitioning from a lighter hue near the horizon to a deeper shade as it ascends. The water below reflects the lighthouse and the surrounding trees, creating a mirror-like effect. The scene is serene and tranquil, with the lighthouse serving as a focal point amidst the natural beauty.

photo_steamedcrabs.jpg.title: Steamed Crabs
photo_steamedcrabs.jpg.description: A plate of steamed crabs sits atop a red and white checkered tablecloth, bathed in the warm, golden light of what appears to be late afternoon. The crabs, with their vibrant orange shells and dark green legs, are piled together, their claws and legs spread out, ready to be served. The setting suggests a casual dining experience, perhaps at a seafood restaurant or a family gathering.

photo_OLyellowsail.jpg.title: Ocracoke Light & Yellow Sailboat
photo_OLyellowsail.jpg.description: A serene coastal scene features a lighthouse standing tall against a soft, pastel sky, casting a gentle glow over the tranquil water. A small sailboat with a blue sail rests peacefully on the calm surface, reflecting the warm light of the setting sun. The surrounding area is dotted with white houses and lush greenery, creating a picturesque and tranquil atmosphere.

photo_stormoverNHP.jpg.title: Thunderstorm Over Nags Head Pier
photo_stormoverNHP.jpg.description: A vibrant beach scene under a dramatic sky, with fluffy white clouds contrasting against a deep blue backdrop. A lone kayaker paddles near the shore, while the ocean waves gently lap at the sandy beach. The pier stretches into the distance, adding a sense of scale and perspective to the expansive view.

photo_angelegg.jpg.title: Angel Wing & Egg Case
photo_angelegg.jpg.description: A close-up of a delicate white seashell with a textured, ribbed surface lies on a bed of small, pebbled stones. Surrounding the shell are bubbles and foam, suggesting a recent tide or wave action. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the intricate details of the shell and the varied colors of the pebbles beneath.

photo_lightningoverNH.jpg.title: Lightning Over Nags Head
photo_lightningoverNH.jpg.description: Lightning streaks across the night sky, illuminating the dark clouds with vibrant purple and white flashes. Below, a row of houses with warm yellow lights glows against the deep blue of the evening sky, creating a stark contrast. The scene captures the raw power of nature against the quiet, human settlement below.

photo_tulips1.jpg.title: Tulips #1
photo_tulips1.jpg.description: Tulips #1 showcases a vibrant cluster of tulips in full bloom, their petals a mix of yellow, orange, and pink, set against a clear blue sky. The image captures the delicate beauty of the flowers from a low angle, emphasizing their height and the bright sunlight that bathes them. The scene evokes a sense of springtime freshness and natural splendor.

photo_tulips2.jpg.title: Tulips #2
photo_tulips2.jpg.description: A vibrant display of red and yellow tulips against a clear blue sky, with sunlight casting a warm glow on the petals. The flowers are in full bloom, creating a lively and colorful scene.

photo_tulips3.jpg.title: Tulips #3
photo_tulips3.jpg.description: A vibrant display of red and yellow tulips against a backdrop of a clear blue sky with scattered clouds. The flowers are in full bloom, creating a lively and colorful scene.

photo_yellowrisecoquina.jpg.title: Yellow Sunrise at Coquina Beach
photo_yellowrisecoquina.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with golden light filtering through clouds and casting a warm glow over the wet sand and gentle waves. The sky is a tapestry of soft, fluffy clouds, reflecting in the still water, creating a tranquil and reflective atmosphere.

photo_nhpierscreen.jpg.title: Nags Head Pier - Window Screen View
photo_nhpierscreen.jpg.description: A view of a pier through a window screen, with raindrops creating a textured pattern across the glass. The pier extends into a calm body of water, with a cloudy sky above. The scene is muted and slightly blurred, suggesting a quiet, overcast day.

photo_friscobeach.jpg.title: Frisco Beach
photo_friscobeach.jpg.description: Frisco Beach's horizon stretches wide, where the deep blue ocean meets the sky. Clouds, heavy with the weight of the day, hang low, casting shadows over the waves. The light suggests early morning or late afternoon, with a soft, diffused glow illuminating the scene.

photo_BIlighttreesnow.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light & Tree in Snow
photo_BIlighttreesnow.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands silhouetted against a vibrant sunset, casting a reflection on the calm water below. Birds fly gracefully in the sky, adding movement to the tranquil scene. The sky is painted with hues of orange, yellow, and blue, creating a serene and picturesque moment.

photo_3pelsunrise.jpg.title: 3 Pelicans in Sunrise
photo_3pelsunrise.jpg.description: A serene desert landscape bathed in the soft, golden light of a sunrise. Sand dunes stretch across the frame, their ripples etched by the wind, while tufts of green grass peek through the white sand, adding a touch of life to the vast expanse. The sky is a pale blue, tinged with hints of pink and orange, suggesting the early morning hours.

photo_OIFC2.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Fishing Center #2
photo_OIFC2.jpg.description: A row of colorful boats is docked at a marina, their vibrant hues reflecting off the calm water. The sky above is partly cloudy, with patches of blue peeking through, suggesting a serene and peaceful day.

photo_ospreyNest.jpg.title: Osprey Nest
photo_ospreyNest.jpg.description: Three ospreys are perched on a nest made of twigs and branches, with the ocean in the background. The ospreys are brown and white, with distinctive black and white markings on their heads. The nest is situated on a rocky outcrop, and the water is calm and blue.

photo_OImarsh.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Marsh
photo_OImarsh.jpg.description: A serene marsh scene under a partly cloudy sky, with vibrant green grasses swaying gently in the breeze. A rainbow arches in the distance, adding a touch of color to the tranquil landscape. The water reflects the sky and grasses, creating a peaceful and natural setting.

photo_jockeyssummer.jpg.title: Jockey's Ridge in Summer
photo_jockeyssummer.jpg.description: A sandy dune landscape with tall grasses and a wooden fence running along the edge. The sky is clear with a few fluffy clouds, and the sand appears smooth and undisturbed.
