photo_currMarshAerial.jpg.title: Currituck Marsh Aerial
photo_currMarshAerial.jpg.description: An aerial view of Currituck Marsh reveals a network of winding waterways and lush green wetlands, with the ocean in the distance. The sky reflects in the water, creating a mirror-like effect. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting a calm morning or late afternoon.

photo_BILightFog.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light in Fog
photo_BILightFog.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a foggy sky, its beam of light piercing through the mist, creating a radiant, starburst effect. The structure is striped in white and black, with a small building at its base. The scene is bathed in a soft, dim light, suggesting early morning or late evening.

photo_blackstallionS.jpg.title: Black Stallion Family at Sunset
photo_blackstallionS.jpg.description: A black stallion and a brown mare stand in a sandy field, surrounded by tall grasses. The stallion is grazing, while the mare and her foal stand close by, also engaged in feeding. The setting sun casts a warm, golden light over the scene, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_blackstallionF.jpg.title: Black Stallion's Family
photo_blackstallionF.jpg.description: A group of wild horses walks along a sandy beach, their coats ranging from light brown to dark black. The ocean waves roll gently in the background under a clear blue sky, casting a soft, natural light on the scene. The horses appear calm and at ease, moving in a line along the shoreline.

photo_horsesreflect.jpg.title: Horses and Reflections
photo_horsesreflect.jpg.description: A group of horses, including a foal, walks along a sandy beach, their hooves touching the wet sand. The horses' coats shimmer in the sunlight, reflecting off the water's edge. The scene is bathed in the soft light of early morning or late afternoon, casting long shadows and creating a serene, natural atmosphere.

photo_HLflag2.jpg.title: Hatteras Light and Flag #2
photo_HLflag2.jpg.description: A silhouette of a lighthouse stands against a dramatic sky, its structure outlined by the golden hues of the setting sun. An American flag waves vigorously in the foreground, its colors vivid against the backdrop. The sky is a canvas of warm oranges, pinks, and deep blues, with scattered clouds adding texture to the scene.

photo_PoIhouse2.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island House in the Marsh #2
photo_PoIhouse2.jpg.description: A serene house sits nestled among golden marsh grasses, with a small stream meandering through the foreground. The sky is a clear, soft blue, suggesting a calm, early morning or late afternoon. The scene evokes a sense of tranquility and isolation, typical of the Outer Banks.

photo_PoIsunrise.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Sunrise
photo_PoIsunrise.jpg.description: A tranquil beach scene at sunrise, with the sun just peeking over the horizon, casting a warm, golden light across the wet sand and reflecting off the gentle waves. The sky is a tapestry of soft blues and purples, dotted with wispy clouds, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_romarshlight.jpg.title: Roanoke Marshes Light - Manteo
photo_romarshlight.jpg.description: A white house with a red metal roof and a lighthouse tower stands on a wooden pier extending into calm water, with a small yellow boat tied to the structure. Distant shoreline buildings appear under a pale blue sky bathed in warm golden hour light, capturing a quiet moment on the Outer Banks.

photo_albemsunset1.jpg.title: Albemarle Sound Sunset #1
photo_albemsunset1.jpg.description: A lone bald cypress tree stands silhouetted against a vibrant sunset, its reflection shimmering on the calm water. The sky transitions from deep blue to fiery orange and yellow, casting a warm glow over the tranquil scene. The stillness of the water mirrors the sky and tree, creating a serene and almost ethereal atmosphere.

photo_albemsunset2.jpg.title: Albemarle Sound Sunset #2
photo_albemsunset2.jpg.description: A solitary cypress tree rises from calm water, its bare branches creating a stark silhouette against a deep blue sky fading into warm orange and yellow near the horizon. The sun's reflection glimmers on the still surface of Albemarle Sound, merging with the water's edges as evening descends over the Outer Banks. This moment captures the quiet interaction of light and shadow during the sunset transition.

photo_BILpurpsky.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light and Purple Sky
photo_BILpurpsky.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands silhouetted against a dramatic sky, with vibrant hues of orange and purple clouds. The sky is filled with billowing clouds, creating a striking contrast with the lighthouse's black and white stripes.

photo_CHaerial1.jpg.title: Cape Hatteras Aerial
photo_CHaerial1.jpg.description: An aerial view of Cape Hatteras, showcasing a long, narrow strip of sand stretching into the ocean, with gentle waves lapping at its edges. The landscape is a blend of sandy beaches and patches of green vegetation, under a bright blue sky dotted with fluffy white clouds. The scene captures the serene beauty of the Outer Banks coastline.

photo_CLcorolla.jpg.title: Currituck Light - Corolla
photo_CLcorolla.jpg.description: A tall, brick lighthouse stands amidst a lush green landscape under a clear blue sky. The lighthouse, framed by the branches of a weeping willow, is bathed in the warm light of what appears to be late afternoon sunlight. The surrounding trees and grass create a serene and picturesque setting.

photo_CLstairsH.jpg.title: Currituck Light Stairwell - Horizontal
photo_CLstairsH.jpg.description: The tall orange brick Currituck Beach Lighthouse rises against a clear blue sky, its distinctive unpainted form flanked by a white keeper's house with dark shutters and a small outbuilding with a rust-red roof. Long afternoon shadows stretch across the manicured green lawn, while flowering trees and willows frame the scene in springtime bloom.

photo_CLstairsV.jpg.title: Currituck Light Stairwell - Vertical
photo_CLstairsV.jpg.description: A spiral staircase with dark green metal railings curves upward inside a brick structure on the Outer Banks, its perforated steps and wooden treads visible beneath a white-framed window. Sunlight streams through the window, illuminating the reddish-brown brick walls and casting sharp shadows on the metal railings, while green pine trees are seen outside in bright daylight. The scene captures a quiet moment within the historic lighthouse stairwell.

photo_fishtourney2.jpg.title: Fishing Tournament #1
photo_fishtourney2.jpg.description: A fleet of white fishing boats glides across the calm, blue waters of the Outer Banks, their wakes trailing behind them. The sun casts a bright, even light across the scene, highlighting the boats and the gentle ripples on the water's surface. The horizon stretches far into the distance, dotted with more boats, suggesting a large-scale fishing event.

photo_hattinlet.jpg.title: Hatteras Inlet
photo_hattinlet.jpg.description: An aerial view of Hatteras Inlet shows a small boat moving through turquoise and green waters, creating a white wake as it navigates between rippled sandbars. The ocean stretches to the horizon under a bright blue sky, with distant landmasses visible on the horizon. Midday sunlight illuminates the layered water colors and the textured sandy patterns of the inlet.

photo_noelbreaker.jpg.title: Hurricane Noel Breaker
photo_noelbreaker.jpg.description: A powerful ocean wave crashes with force, its crest curling and breaking into a dramatic spray of white foam. The sunlight bathes the scene in a warm, golden hue, highlighting the deep blues and greens of the water. The moment captures the raw energy and beauty of nature in motion.

photo_ocracokeaerial1.jpg.title: Ocracoke Aerial #1
photo_ocracokeaerial1.jpg.description: An aerial view of Ocracoke Island, showcasing a small town nestled between the ocean and a lagoon, with greenery and buildings dotting the landscape. The water reflects the sky, and a small boat is visible near the shore, suggesting a peaceful coastal setting.

photo_ocracokeaerial2.jpg.title: Ocracoke Aerial #2
photo_ocracokeaerial2.jpg.description: An aerial view of Ocracoke Island, showcasing its long, narrow shape stretching into the Atlantic Ocean. The island is bordered by a mix of green vegetation and sandy beaches, with a road winding along its length. The water reflects the sky, creating a serene and expansive scene.

photo_ocracokeaerial3.jpg.title: Ocracoke Aerial #3
photo_ocracokeaerial3.jpg.description: An aerial view of Ocracoke Island, showcasing a small settlement nestled between the expansive blue waters of the Atlantic Ocean and the sandy shoreline. The island is dotted with houses and greenery, with a lighthouse standing prominently near the coast. The sky is a clear blue with a few scattered clouds, suggesting a calm and sunny day.

photo_ocracokeaerial4.jpg.title: Ocracoke Aerial #4
photo_ocracokeaerial4.jpg.description: An aerial view of Ocracoke Island, a long, narrow strip of land surrounded by the deep blue waters of the Atlantic Ocean. The island's sandy beaches and sparse vegetation are visible, with a few small boats scattered near the shore. The sky is a clear, light blue with a few wispy clouds, suggesting a calm, sunny day.

photo_Olightatnight.jpg.title: Ocracoke Light at Night
photo_Olightatnight.jpg.description: A white picket fence borders a grassy lawn in the foreground, with silhouetted trees and houses behind it under a dark blue night sky. The Ocracoke lighthouse glows brightly in the distance, while warm yellow light spills from windows of a yellow house, casting long shadows across the lawn. This nighttime scene on the Outer Banks captures the quiet coexistence of coastal architecture and natural landscape.

photo_portsislemarsh.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Marsh
photo_portsislemarsh.jpg.description: An aerial view of Portsmouth Island Marsh reveals intricate patterns of waterways and wetlands, with varying shades of green and blue. The image captures the natural beauty of the marshland, showcasing the interplay of land and water in a serene and undisturbed setting.

photo_sunrisepierfish.jpg.title: Sunrise and Pier Fisherman
photo_sunrisepierfish.jpg.description: A serene sunrise bathes the sky in golden hues, casting a warm glow over the ocean and reflecting off the wet sand of a beach. Gentle waves lap at the shore, and fluffy clouds drift lazily across the sky, creating a tranquil and picturesque scene.

photo_breaker.jpg.title: Breaker
photo_breaker.jpg.description: A powerful wave crashes against the shore, creating a frothy spray of water. The ocean is a deep blue, with the wave's crest curling over and breaking, leaving a trail of white foam behind.

photo_CHdunes2.jpg.title: Dunes at Cape Hatteras #2
photo_CHdunes2.jpg.description: A vast expanse of sand dunes stretches beneath a sky filled with fluffy white clouds. The sun casts a warm, golden light on the grassy dunes, highlighting their texture and the gentle sway of the grasses in the breeze. The scene evokes a sense of tranquility and the raw beauty of nature.

photo_cottagesunrise2.jpg.title: Cottage & Sunrise #2
photo_cottagesunrise2.jpg.description: A silhouetted wooden cottage with a raised deck stands against a vibrant orange sunrise sky, its railings and structure forming dark outlines. The low sun glows through the deck's railing, casting a warm light into the interior, while distant wooden fence posts line the horizon above a grassy field. The scene captures early morning light as the sun rises, creating a soft golden atmosphere across the landscape.

photo_Egardens2.jpg.title: Elizabethan Gardens
photo_Egardens2.jpg.description: A stone fountain with a central statue sits within a garden, its circular basin filled with blue water and enclosed by a stone balustrade. Lush crape myrtle trees heavy with pink flowers frame the fountain, their green foliage dense under bright daylight, while a paved pathway leads to the water feature, bordered by neatly trimmed hedges.

photo_NHPiersunrise.jpg.title: Nags Head Pier at Sunrise
photo_NHPiersunrise.jpg.description: Three fishermen stand on a wooden pier at sunrise, their figures silhouetted against the vibrant orange and pink hues of the sky. The sun is just beginning to rise, casting a warm glow over the water and the pier. A bird perches on the railing, adding a touch of life to the scene. The calm water reflects the colors of the sky, creating a mirror effect.

photo_rainbowpamsound.jpg.title: Rainbow Over Pamlico Sound
photo_rainbowpamsound.jpg.description: A serene scene of a double rainbow arching over a calm body of water, likely a lake or a large pond. The sky is partly cloudy, with the sun partially obscured by the rainbow. A bird is seen flying in the middle of the rainbow, adding a sense of movement and life to the tranquil setting. The water reflects the colors of the rainbow, creating a beautiful and symmetrical effect.

photo_transwave.jpg.title: Transluscent Wave
photo_transwave.jpg.description: A large ocean wave breaks into white foam, its translucent green body revealing deep blue water beneath as bright afternoon sunlight filters through the surface. The wave curls forward in the open sea, with light reflecting off the water’s surface and droplets suspended in the air.

photo_roanokemarshlight.jpg.title: Roanoke Marshes Light #1
photo_roanokemarshlight.jpg.description: A white lighthouse with a red gabled roof and black lantern room sits on a wooden pier extending into choppy gray water. Two small boats—one white motorboat and one blue rowboat—are moored near the dock, with gentle ripples reflecting sunlight on the water’s surface. The scene captures a quiet daytime moment in the Roanoke Marshes, Outer Banks.

photo_clookoutlight.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Lighthouse at Sunset
photo_clookoutlight.jpg.description: A tall, black and blue striped lighthouse stands prominently against a vibrant sunset sky. The sun is setting behind the lighthouse, casting a warm orange and pink glow across the sky. The lighthouse's structure is illuminated, creating a striking contrast against the fading light. The surrounding area is lush with greenery, and the ocean is visible in the background, adding to the serene and picturesque setting.

photo_ocracoketwilight.jpg.title: Ocracoke Twilight
photo_ocracoketwilight.jpg.description: A small white rowboat floats on a glassy waterway at Ocracoke, North Carolina, during twilight. The still water reflects the boat's silhouette and the warm pink and orange hues of the setting sun, which blend with cool blue tones in the sky. Distant marshes, a building with a tower, and tall grasses in the foreground frame the quiet moment of dusk.

photo_pelicanline.jpg.title: Pelican Line at Sunrise
photo_pelicanline.jpg.description: A tranquil beach scene at sunrise, with golden light filtering through clouds and casting a warm glow over the wet sand and gentle waves. The sky is a tapestry of soft blues and yellows, with fluffy clouds reflecting in the wet sand, creating a serene and reflective atmosphere.

photo_pelicansnest.jpg.title: Pelicans on Nest
photo_pelicansnest.jpg.description: Two brown pelicans rest on a nest made of straw and dried grasses, their long bills tucked against their chests in a resting posture. The birds display the distinctive brown and white plumage of the species, with their textured feathers clearly visible in the natural daylight. Green vegetation surrounds the nesting area, with rocks visible in the background.

photo_redhorsegrass.jpg.title: Red Horse & Grass
photo_redhorsegrass.jpg.description: A chestnut-colored horse grazes peacefully in a marshy area, surrounded by tall, slender grasses. The horse's coat reflects the soft, golden light of what appears to be early morning or late afternoon. The scene is tranquil, with the horse's head lowered as it feeds on the vegetation.

photo_roanokemarsheslight.jpg.title: Roanoke Marshes Light #2
photo_roanokemarsheslight.jpg.description: A silhouetted wooden pier with a lighthouse structure extends over calm water, its reflection mirrored perfectly in the glassy surface. Sunset casts warm golden and orange light across the horizon, illuminating distant marshlands and low-lying land under the soft evening glow. This moment captures the serene transition of day into night over the Roanoke Marshes, with the still water enhancing the vibrancy of the sunset hues.

photo_sepiaseaoats.jpg.title: Sepia Sea Oats
photo_sepiaseaoats.jpg.description: Sepia-toned sea oats sway gently in the breeze, their delicate fronds reaching towards a dramatic sky filled with billowing clouds. The scene is bathed in soft, diffused light, suggesting a time of day when the sun is low, casting long shadows and creating a tranquil, almost ethereal atmosphere.

photo_shadboatavon.jpg.title: Sepia Shad Boat in Avon
photo_shadboatavon.jpg.description: An old, weathered boat named 'Edwin A.R.' rests on a sandy shore, its wooden hull and cabin showing signs of age and neglect. The sepia tone gives the scene a nostalgic, timeless feel, with the sky above dotted with fluffy clouds. The setting sun casts a warm, golden light across the landscape, highlighting the textures of the boat and the surrounding grasses.

photo_surfing.jpg.title: Surfing at Jennette's Pier
photo_surfing.jpg.description: A surfer is riding a powerful wave at Jennette's Pier, with another surfer in the background. The wave is curling over, creating a dramatic and dynamic scene. The water is a mix of deep blue and white foam, indicating the force of the wave. The surfer in the foreground is wearing a wetsuit and is in a crouched position, balancing on the surfboard. The sky is clear, suggesting it is a sunny day.

photo_surfunderpier.jpg.title: Surf Under Pier
photo_surfunderpier.jpg.description: A wooden pier extends into the ocean, its posts standing tall against a backdrop of crashing waves. The golden light of sunset illuminates the scene, casting a warm glow over the water and the structure. The waves splash against the pier, creating a dynamic interplay of water and wood.

photo_terns.jpg.title: Terns
photo_terns.jpg.description: A flock of seagulls soars through a bright blue sky, their white bodies contrasting sharply against the azure backdrop. The birds are in mid-flight, some with wings fully extended, creating a dynamic and lively scene. The light is natural and even, suggesting a daytime scene with clear weather.

photo_thewave.jpg.title: The Wave
photo_thewave.jpg.description: A powerful wave crashes against the shore, its white foam curling and expanding as it breaks. The sky above is a clear blue, dotted with fluffy white clouds, suggesting a bright, sunny day. The ocean's deep blue contrasts sharply with the white of the breaking wave, creating a dynamic and dramatic scene.

photo_thunderheadatsunrise.jpg.title: Thunderhead at Sunrise
photo_thunderheadatsunrise.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunrise, with the sun just peeking over the horizon, casting a warm golden light through the clouds. The ocean waves gently lap onto the sandy shore, creating a soft, foamy edge. The sky is a mix of dark blues and soft yellows, with scattered clouds adding texture and depth to the scene.

photo_waterspout.jpg.title: Waterspout & Pelicans
photo_waterspout.jpg.description: Two brown pelicans glide through the air above a vast ocean, their wings spread wide as they approach a dark funnel of a waterspout spiraling down from a cloud-filled sky into the sea. The sky displays a mix of slate blue and soft white clouds, while the ocean reflects a deep turquoise hue under diffused late afternoon light. This moment captures the pelicans moving near the waterspout off the Outer Banks.

photo_wilmasurf.jpg.title: Hurricane Wilma Surf
photo_wilmasurf.jpg.description: A powerful wave crashes against the shore, its white foam contrasting sharply with the deep blue of the ocean. The light suggests early morning or late afternoon, casting a soft glow on the scene. The wave's dynamic movement and the texture of the foam evoke a sense of raw, untamed nature.

photo_stormysea.jpg.title: Stormy Sea at Sunset
photo_stormysea.jpg.description: Golden sunlight bathes the crashing waves of the sea, illuminating the frothy white foam against the sandy shore. The image captures the raw power and beauty of the ocean at sunset, with the light creating a warm, glowing effect.

photo_NHwaterspout.jpg.title: Nags Head Waterspout
photo_NHwaterspout.jpg.description: A tall, dark gray funnel cloud extends vertically from a dense cloud layer toward the ground, forming a distinct spiral shape over the Outer Banks. Below, a residential area with low-slung houses and green trees sits under a partly cloudy sky with patches of blue and white, illuminated by bright daylight. Sunlight filters through the upper clouds, highlighting the funnel's edges while casting soft light over the landscape, suggesting a late morning time of day.

photo_afternoonrainbow.jpg.title: Late Afternoon Rainbow
photo_afternoonrainbow.jpg.description: A vibrant rainbow arcs gracefully over a sandy beach, its colors vivid against the blue sky. The ocean waves crash onto the shore, creating white foam. The scene is bathed in the warm, golden light of late afternoon, casting long shadows and highlighting the fluffy clouds in the sky.

photo_fishermenocracoke.jpg.title: Fishermen on Ocracoke
photo_fishermenocracoke.jpg.description: Two fishermen stand silhouetted against a vibrant orange and yellow sunset, casting their lines into the ocean. The scene is bathed in the warm glow of the setting sun, casting long shadows on the sandy beach. The ocean waves gently lap at the shore, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_pelican10.jpg.title: Pelican #10
photo_pelican10.jpg.description: A brown pelican soars gracefully over the ocean, its wings spread wide against the backdrop of crashing waves. The sunlight bathes the scene in a warm, golden light, highlighting the pelican's textured feathers and the dynamic motion of the water below. The image captures a moment of serene beauty in the Outer Banks.

photo_bodielightning.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light & Lightning
photo_bodielightning.jpg.description: A Bodie Island Lighthouse stands illuminated against a dark, stormy sky, with streaks of lightning illuminating the night. The lighthouse's beacon pierces the darkness, casting a warm glow on the surrounding landscape. The scene captures the raw power of nature and the enduring presence of human-made structures.

photo_bodiesnow.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light in Snow
photo_bodiesnow.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands prominently in the snowy landscape, its black and white striped structure contrasting sharply with the white snow. The surrounding trees are bare, their branches reaching upwards, and the sky is overcast with gray clouds, suggesting a cold, wintry day.

photo_curritucklight.jpg.title: Currituck Light & Keeper's House
photo_curritucklight.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a clear blue sky, casting a long shadow over a well-maintained lawn. The adjacent keeper's house, with its white siding and red roof, complements the scene. The setting sun bathes the landscape in warm, golden light, highlighting the textures of the grass and the lighthouse's brickwork.

photo_fresnelsunset.jpg.title: Fresnel Lens & Sunset
photo_fresnelsunset.jpg.description: A close-up of a lighthouse's Fresnel lens, its intricate glass segments reflecting the warm hues of a setting sun. The lens is positioned indoors, with a view of the ocean and sky through a window, capturing the last light of day. The scene evokes a sense of tranquility and the passage of time.

photo_fresnel.jpg.title: Fresnel Lens Wide View
photo_fresnel.jpg.description: A close-up view of a lighthouse's Fresnel lens, illuminated from within, casting a warm, golden glow. The intricate glass prisms refract the light, creating a mesmerizing pattern of light and shadow. The setting appears to be during twilight, with a soft, purple hue in the background suggesting the transition from day to night.

photo_gullsun.jpg.title: Gull in Sun
photo_gullsun.jpg.description: A silhouette of a seagull glides gracefully against the backdrop of a deep blue sky, with the sun positioned just above the horizon, casting a soft, diffused light. Below, the ocean's surface shimmers with the reflection of the sun, creating a serene and tranquil scene. The image captures a moment of calm and natural beauty, with the seagull as the focal point.

photo_HLstairs.jpg.title: Hatteras Light Stairwell
photo_HLstairs.jpg.description: A spiral staircase winds upward within a cylindrical structure, its wooden steps and metal railing casting shadows against the white walls. The light filters through, creating a warm, inviting glow that highlights the texture of the walls and the intricate design of the staircase.

photo_pierredsunrise.jpg.title: Pier & Red Sunrise
photo_pierredsunrise.jpg.description: A wooden pier stretches into calm ocean waters during sunrise, its silhouette marked by a small structure at the far end. Gentle waves lap against the dark sand shore, reflecting the sky’s vibrant orange and red hues. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting warm light across the water and creating long shadows on the beach.

photo_hurricaneswell.jpg.title: Hurricane Swell
photo_hurricaneswell.jpg.description: A vast expanse of ocean stretches to the horizon, its surface rippling with gentle waves under a soft, diffused light. The sky above is a pale blue, dotted with wispy clouds, suggesting a calm, early morning or late afternoon scene. The horizon line is barely visible, blending the sea and sky into a serene, almost ethereal vista.

photo_jennettes.jpg.title: Jennette's Pier Morning View
photo_jennettes.jpg.description: A serene morning view under Jennette's Pier, with sunlight filtering through the wooden beams, casting a golden glow on the waves crashing below. The scene is tranquil, with the interplay of light and shadow creating a sense of depth and mystery.

other_floridasunrise.jpg.title: Florida Sunrise
other_floridasunrise.jpg.description: Two palm trees stand tall on a beach, their fronds swaying gently in the breeze. The sky is painted with hues of orange and purple, suggesting a sunrise or sunset. The ocean stretches out to the horizon, its surface calm and reflective.

other_sunrisejulianlake.jpg.title: Sunrise at Julian Price Lake
other_sunrisejulianlake.jpg.description: A serene autumn scene at Julian Price Lake, where a tall tree with vibrant orange and yellow leaves stands on the shore, its reflection shimmering in the calm waters. The sky is a brilliant blue, transitioning into a soft, golden hue as the sun rises, casting a warm glow over the entire landscape.

other_wyoming20154.jpg.title: Wyoming 2015 - 4
other_wyoming20154.jpg.description: A serene lakeside scene at sunset, with the golden hues of the setting sun reflecting off the calm water. The distant Tetons stand tall against the sky, their peaks partially obscured by wispy clouds. The foreground features a rocky shoreline with patches of grass and trees, adding texture to the tranquil landscape.

other_wyoming20151545.jpg.title: Wyoming 2015 - 1545
other_wyoming20151545.jpg.description: A herd of bison grazes peacefully in a vast, open field under a clear blue sky. Steam rises from geothermal vents in the distance, adding a dynamic element to the serene landscape. The golden grasses and scattered trees frame the scene, evoking a sense of tranquility and natural beauty.

other_wyoming20151627.jpg.title: Wyoming 2015 - Jackson Lake and the Tetons
other_wyoming20151627.jpg.description: A serene lakeside scene at sunset, with the golden hues of the setting sun reflecting off the calm water. The foreground features a rocky shoreline with patches of grass and trees, while the background showcases a range of snow-capped Teton mountains under a partly cloudy sky. The tranquil atmosphere suggests a peaceful evening in a mountainous region.

other_wmsburg20144.jpg.title: Williamsburg 2014 #4
other_wmsburg20144.jpg.description: A solitary figure in a teal coat walks away from a brick church on a snow-covered path, bare trees flanking the scene under a pale, overcast sky. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting a late afternoon or early evening in a quiet, historic setting.

other_wmsburg20141.jpg.title: Williamsburg 2014 #1
other_wmsburg20141.jpg.description: A red lion emblem hangs from a wooden signboard, suspended above a snow-covered courtyard. The sign is affixed to a brick building, with a large tree branch extending into the frame, partially obscuring the view. The scene is quiet and serene, with muted colors and soft lighting suggesting a cool winter day.

other_willXmaswreath.jpg.title: Williamsburg Christmas Wreath
other_willXmaswreath.jpg.description: A festive Christmas wreath hangs on a teal door, adorned with pine needles, dried flowers, pinecones, and feathers. The wreath is illuminated by soft, natural light, suggesting a calm, early morning or late afternoon setting. The scene evokes a sense of holiday cheer and rustic charm.

other_will2010289.jpg.title: Williamsburg 2010 #289
other_will2010289.jpg.description: A man and a woman stand in front of a red wooden building, dressed in period attire. The woman wears a red cape and a bonnet, while the man is in a green coat and white gloves. They are smiling and appear to be posing for a photograph. The scene is set in the sunlight, with snow on the ground and evergreen branches hanging from the building. The setting suggests a historical reenactment or a themed event.

other_will2010258.jpg.title: Williamsburg 2010 #258
other_will2010258.jpg.description: A festive wreath adorned with pinecones, apples, and pears hangs on a snowy railing, creating a warm contrast against the cold, white backdrop. The scene is set in a quiet, wintry environment, with the soft light of early morning or late afternoon casting a gentle glow on the snow-covered ground and the rustic building in the background.

other_will2010250.jpg.title: Williamsburg 2010 #250
other_will2010250.jpg.description: A red brick colonial-style building stands under a snow-covered roof, its windows framed by dark shutters. Snow blankets the ground and the surrounding trees, creating a serene winter scene. The building's steps lead up to a small signpost, and wreaths hang from the windows, adding a festive touch.

other_will2010238.jpg.title: Williamsburg 2010 #238
other_will2010238.jpg.description: A snow-covered red brick house with steep, snow-laden roofs stands amidst a quiet, wintry landscape. Bare trees frame the house, their branches heavy with snow. The scene is bathed in soft, diffused light, suggesting a calm, overcast day. A wooden bench and barrels are scattered in the foreground, adding to the rustic charm of the setting.

other_will2010209.jpg.title: Williamsburg 2010 #209
other_will2010209.jpg.description: A red brick colonial-style building stands under a snow-covered roof, its windows framed by dark shutters. Snow blankets the ground and the surrounding trees, creating a serene winter scene. The building's steps lead up to a small sign, and festive wreaths adorn the entrance, suggesting a holiday season. The light is soft and diffused, typical of a cloudy winter day.

photo_scotchbonnetshells.jpg.title: Scotch Bonnet Shells
photo_scotchbonnetshells.jpg.description: A collection of Scotch Bonnet shells is displayed, their light beige and cream hues catching the sunlight, creating a warm, golden glow. The shells are tightly packed, showcasing their spiral shapes and smooth textures, with some shells slightly overlapping others. The image captures a moment of stillness, highlighting the natural beauty and intricate details of these seashells.

ill_superwings.jpg.title: Super Wings
ill_superwings.jpg.description: A vibrant, neon-lit storefront named 'Super Wings' glows against a twilight sky, its bright red and yellow signage casting a warm, inviting light. In front, colorful inflatable wings add a playful, carnival-like atmosphere, swaying slightly in the breeze. The scene suggests a lively, late-night gathering or event.

ill_oregoninletmarinaeastside.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Marina-East Side
ill_oregoninletmarinaeastside.jpg.description: A line of sport fishing boats sits docked along a wooden pier under a partly cloudy sky at Oregon Inlet Marina on the Outer Banks. The vessels, including one named 'SMOKER' from Manteo, NC, display tall outriggers and flybridge towers characteristic of offshore charter boats, their white hulls gleaming in the daylight. The scene captures the working marina atmosphere where these boats prepare for deep-sea fishing expeditions in North Carolina waters.

ill_CLstairwell1.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Stairwell #1
ill_CLstairwell1.jpg.description: A view looking upward through a spiral staircase inside the Cape Lookout lighthouse reveals warm brick walls curving toward a bright circular opening at the top. A black metal central column anchors the iron steps, with a glowing orb light suspended from above casting a green-tinged illumination across the textured masonry.

ill_horsesgrazing.jpg.title: Horses Grazing
ill_horsesgrazing.jpg.description: A group of horses stands in shallow water, heads lowered to drink or graze on submerged vegetation. The animals are painted in warm tones of brown and tan, their reflections mirroring in the still water beneath them. Behind them, a coastal marsh landscape stretches out under soft, diffused light.

ill_horsesheadover.jpg.title: Horses Head Over Shoulder
ill_horsesheadover.jpg.description: An adult horse and a younger foal stand close together in a grassy field, their bodies overlapping as the horse's head extends protectively over the foal's shoulder. The pair displays warm brown and tan coloring with flowing dark manes, captured in soft, painterly light that emphasizes the texture of their coats and the gentle bond between them.

ill_daybeach.jpg.title: Day at the Beach
ill_daybeach.jpg.description: A young girl stands on sandy beach terrain, holding a white seashell in her hands while looking down at it with concentration. She wears a blue and pink striped bikini, her blonde hair windswept, with dramatic shadows cast across her body from bright overhead sunlight.

photo_tundraswansAL.jpg.title: Tundra Swans in Afternoon Light
photo_tundraswansAL.jpg.description: Hundreds of tundra swans gather on a wetland pond, their white forms densely covering the blue water while a few take flight in the background. Warm afternoon light bathes the scene, illuminating the swans against brown grasses and bare trees that line the horizon. The birds float, preen, and fly in a mix of rest and activity across this winter staging area.

photo_moonrisepungolake.jpg.title: Moonrise at Pungo Lake
photo_moonrisepungolake.jpg.description: A large flock of tundra swans floats on the blue waters of Pungo Lake at dusk, their white forms scattered across the surface. Behind them, a brown marsh and bare trees stretch along the shoreline under a deepening blue sky, while a full moon rises orange above the distant treeline.

photo_trawlersilhouette.jpg.title: Trawler in Silhouette
photo_trawlersilhouette.jpg.description: A commercial fishing trawler appears in dark silhouette against a golden sunset sky and shimmering water. The vessel's rigging, masts, and nets create an intricate pattern of lines and shapes as it sits at anchor in calm waters, while the low sun casts warm amber light across the rippled surface of the sea.

photo_backsidePI.jpg.title: Backside of Portsmouth Island
photo_backsidePI.jpg.description: An aerial view reveals the intricate tidal channels and sandbars along the backside of Portsmouth Island in the Outer Banks. Shallow water transitions from deep turquoise to pale green, carving branching patterns through exposed sand and marsh grass. The contrast between the white sand beach, colored water, and darker wetland vegetation creates an abstract natural composition.

photo_basnightbridgeOI.jpg.title: Basnight Bridge at Oregon Inlet
photo_basnightbridgeOI.jpg.description: Golden seed heads of seaside grass arch gracefully in the foreground, framing the curved concrete spans of the Basnight Bridge as it stretches across Oregon Inlet on the Outer Banks. The soft afternoon light illuminates the delicate grass against a clear blue sky, while the bridge's elegant loops fade into a gentle blur in the background.

photo_fierysunsetNH.jpg.title: Fiery Sunset in Nags Head
photo_fierysunsetNH.jpg.description: A wooden pier stretches across calm water toward a covered gazebo structure, silhouetted against a dramatic sunset in Nags Head. The sky blazes with orange and yellow light near the horizon while dark storm clouds gather above in shades of blue and purple, their colors reflected in the rippling water below.

ill_5pelicanswave.jpg.title: 5 Pelicans Over Glassy Wave
ill_5pelicanswave.jpg.description: Five pelicans are captured in mid-flight over a glassy wave, their wings spread wide as they soar above the cresting ocean. The pelicans are silhouetted against the bright blue sky, creating a striking contrast. The wave's surface is smooth and reflective, mirroring the pelicans and the sky, adding a sense of symmetry to the scene.

other_crabtreefallsBR.jpg.title: Crabtree Falls in the Blue Ridge
other_crabtreefallsBR.jpg.description: A cascading waterfall flows down a rocky cliff, surrounded by vibrant autumn foliage. The water appears to be in motion, creating a dynamic and lively scene. The trees are adorned with a mix of green and yellow leaves, indicating the fall season.

other_wyoming20151441.jpg.title: Wyoming 2015 - 1441
other_wyoming20151441.jpg.description: The Grand Teton range, bathed in the warm, golden light of a sunrise, stands majestically against a clear blue sky. The peaks are reflected perfectly in a calm, still pond below, creating a mirror-like effect. The surrounding landscape is a mix of vibrant autumn foliage and dense evergreen trees, adding to the serene and picturesque scene.

photo_beachthead.jpg.title: Beach & Thunderheads
photo_beachthead.jpg.description: A serene beach scene with gentle waves lapping against the shore, creating a frothy white foam. The sky is a vibrant blue, dotted with fluffy white clouds, some of which are beginning to form large, ominous thunderheads. The sand is a rich, golden color, and the ocean water is a deep, emerald green, reflecting the sky's hues.

photo_beachtown.jpg.title: Beach Town
photo_beachtown.jpg.description: An aerial view of a beach town with rows of blue and white striped awnings lining the shore. The waves crash onto the shore, creating a dynamic and lively scene. The sky is clear, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_beautifulmorningcurrituck.jpg.title: A Beautiful Morning on the Currituck OBX
photo_beautifulmorningcurrituck.jpg.description: Three horses stand on a sandy beach, their coats glistening in the soft light of a sunrise. The sky above is a dramatic canvas of clouds, with rays of sunlight piercing through, casting a warm glow over the scene. The ocean stretches out in the background, its surface calm and reflective.

photo_BILstairwell2.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light Stairwell #2
photo_BILstairwell2.jpg.description: A spiral staircase inside a lighthouse, with a window above it showing a view of the ocean and a grassy area. The staircase is made of metal with a black, perforated design, and the walls are white brick.

photo_BILstartrails.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light & Star Trails
photo_BILstartrails.jpg.description: A tall, cylindrical lighthouse stands prominently against a starry night sky, with circular star trails forming a mesmerizing pattern around it. The lighthouse is illuminated with a warm, golden light, contrasting with the cool, dark hues of the night sky. The surrounding area is dimly lit, with a small building nearby, possibly a keeper's quarters, featuring red windows and a white fence.

photo_CLLkeepershouse.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Light & Keeper's House
photo_CLLkeepershouse.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a starry night sky, its beam cutting through the darkness. The structure features a distinctive black and white striped pattern, and a small white building is situated nearby. The grassy foreground adds a natural element to the scene, and the Milky Way galaxy is visible in the background, creating a breathtaking celestial display.

photo_CLLpano.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Light Panoramic
photo_CLLpano.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands on a grassy hill, its beam illuminating the night sky. The Milky Way galaxy is visible, stretching across the sky, creating a stunning contrast with the bright light from the lighthouse. The surrounding area is dark, with a few trees and a small building nearby.

photo_clookoutbeach1.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Beach & Umbrella - Horizontal View
photo_clookoutbeach1.jpg.description: A vibrant beach scene with clear blue skies and a bright orange umbrella partially visible. The sandy shore is wet, reflecting the sunlight, and the turquoise ocean stretches out to the horizon. A few seagulls are seen flying in the distance, adding to the serene atmosphere.

photo_daysend.jpg.title: Day's End at Oregon Inlet #1
photo_daysend.jpg.description: A serene harbor scene with several colorful boats docked along the pier. The water is calm, reflecting the boats and the sky, which is a mix of blue and white clouds. The setting appears to be a coastal area, possibly the Outer Banks, given the title of the photograph.

photo_decoyscharter.jpg.title: Decoys and Charter Boats
photo_decoyscharter.jpg.description: A collection of colorful duck decoys, primarily in shades of red and black, are prominently displayed in the foreground. These decoys are arranged in a somewhat haphazard manner, with some overlapping each other. In the background, several charter boats are docked, their masts and hulls visible above the water. The sky is partly cloudy, suggesting a calm, possibly early morning or late afternoon setting.

photo_earlybirdreward.jpg.title: Early Bird's Reward
photo_earlybirdreward.jpg.description: A dramatic sunset over the ocean, with a large cloud formation casting a golden light through its center. The waves gently break on the shore, creating a serene and peaceful scene.

photo_egretpair.jpg.title: Great Egret Pair
photo_egretpair.jpg.description: A Great Egret stands gracefully on a branch, its long neck curved as it surveys its surroundings. The bird's white feathers contrast sharply with the dark, reflective water in the background, creating a serene and natural scene.

photo_firesky.jpg.title: Fire in the Sky
photo_firesky.jpg.description: A striking lighthouse stands tall against a dramatic sky filled with lightning bolts. The lighthouse, with its black and white striped pattern, is illuminated by a bright light, contrasting sharply with the dark, stormy clouds. The lightning strikes from the sky create a vivid and powerful display, adding a sense of awe and intensity to the scene.

photo_foggydawnBIL.jpg.title: Foggy Dawn at Bodie Island Light
photo_foggydawnBIL.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands illuminated against a dark, foggy sky, its beam piercing the mist. To the left, a small building is partially obscured by the fog, while a larger structure with a porch is lit warmly, casting a soft glow. The scene is serene and quiet, capturing the early morning atmosphere.

photo_galaxylighthouse.jpg.title: The Galaxy and the Lighthouse
photo_galaxylighthouse.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands illuminated against a starry sky, with the Milky Way arching overhead. The lighthouse's beam cuts through the darkness, casting a beam of light that pierces the night. The surrounding area is dotted with small buildings, their lights glowing softly in the darkness. The sky is a deep blue, filled with countless stars, creating a serene and majestic scene.

photo_gullgreenwater.jpg.title: Seagull Over Green Water
photo_gullgreenwater.jpg.description: A seagull is captured in mid-flight over a body of greenish water, its wings spread wide. The bird's feathers are a mix of brown and white, with darker tips on the wings. The water appears calm, with slight ripples and bubbles visible, suggesting a gentle breeze.

photo_hatterasinlet21.jpg.title: Hatteras Inlet - October 2021
photo_hatterasinlet21.jpg.description: An aerial view of Hatteras Inlet in October 2021, showcasing the intricate network of channels and islands that form the inlet. The water is a vibrant blue, with patches of green vegetation and sandy beaches visible along the edges. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_HIfrompoint.jpg.title: Hatteras Island From The Point
photo_HIfrompoint.jpg.description: An expansive aerial view of Hatteras Island, showcasing its long, sandy coastline that stretches into the ocean. The beach is dotted with lush greenery and a few structures, likely beachfront properties or recreational areas. The water is a vibrant turquoise, transitioning to a deeper blue as it approaches the shore. The sky is clear and bright, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_HLaerialold.jpg.title: Hatteras Light Aerial - 1997
photo_HLaerialold.jpg.description: A striking lighthouse stands tall on a sandy beach, its black and white striped pattern contrasting sharply with the turquoise ocean waves crashing against the shore. The lighthouse is surrounded by lush greenery and a white picket fence, with a small shed nearby. The sky is clear, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_horsesnewfoal.jpg.title: Horse Family with New Foal
photo_horsesnewfoal.jpg.description: A horse family, including a mother and her foal, stands on a sandy beach near the ocean. The mother horse has a long, flowing mane and a dark coat, while the foal is a lighter shade with a white patch on its forehead. The ocean waves gently roll in the background, and the light suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_marefoalbow.jpg.title: Mare and Foal Bowing
photo_marefoalbow.jpg.description: A brown horse and a foal are bowing on a sandy beach with the ocean waves crashing in the background. The horse's mane is flowing, and the foal is leaning its head towards the horse, creating a tender moment between the two.

photo_maresrestingcarova.jpg.title: Mares Resting in Carova
photo_maresrestingcarova.jpg.description: Two dark brown horses with long manes are lying down on a sandy beach. The sunlight casts a warm glow on their fur, highlighting the texture of their coats. The horses appear relaxed and at ease, possibly resting or grazing. The beach is sandy and appears to be a popular spot for wildlife, suggesting a natural, undisturbed environment.

photo_milkyBIL.jpg.title: The Milky Way over Bodie Island Light
photo_milkyBIL.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a starry night sky, with the Milky Way visible in the background. The lighthouse is illuminated, casting a warm glow that contrasts with the cool blue tones of the stars. A meteor streaks across the sky, adding a dynamic element to the serene scene.

photo_ocracoke6000.jpg.title: Ocracoke Island from 6000'
photo_ocracoke6000.jpg.description: An aerial view of Ocracoke Island, showcasing its long, narrow shape stretching into the ocean. The island is bordered by a sandy beach on one side and a body of water on the other, with a small strip of land connecting the two. The water is a deep blue, and the sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_ocracokesunrise22.jpg.title: Ocracoke Sunrise
photo_ocracokesunrise22.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunset, with the sun setting behind the ocean, casting a warm, orange glow across the sky and the water. The waves gently lap against the shore, creating a tranquil and peaceful atmosphere. A seagull is seen flying in the sky, adding to the natural beauty of the scene.

photo_ocraloak.jpg.title: Ocracoke Live Oak
photo_ocraloak.jpg.description: A majestic live oak tree stands tall, its twisted branches reaching out towards the sky. The tree's bark is rough and textured, with patches of moss clinging to its surface. The surrounding foliage is lush and green, with hints of blue sky peeking through the leaves. The scene is serene and natural, capturing the essence of a forested area.

photo_OI6000.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet from 6000'
photo_OI6000.jpg.description: An aerial view of a coastal landscape featuring a sandy beach leading into a narrow inlet, where the ocean meets a series of interconnected waterways and islands. The water is a gradient of blue, transitioning from deep blue to lighter shades near the shore, and the sky above is clear with a few scattered clouds.

photo_OLunderstars.jpg.title: Ocracoke Light Under the Stars
photo_OLunderstars.jpg.description: A tall, white lighthouse stands prominently against a starry night sky, its light piercing through the darkness. The lighthouse is surrounded by a few trees, their silhouettes visible against the illuminated structure. The sky is a deep blue, dotted with countless stars, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_peaisledunes.jpg.title: Pea Island Dunescape
photo_peaisledunes.jpg.description: Golden sand dunes rise gently against a backdrop of fluffy white clouds, their undulating forms softened by the gentle breeze. Sparse patches of green vegetation cling to the dunes, providing a stark contrast to the sandy expanse. The light is warm and soft, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_PIchurchint.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Church Interior
photo_PIchurchint.jpg.description: The interior of a church features wooden pews arranged in rows, with large, arched windows allowing natural light to filter through. The light creates a serene and somewhat somber atmosphere, highlighting the texture of the wooden pews and the simplicity of the church's design.

photo_porchatsunrise.jpg.title: Porch at Sunrise
photo_porchatsunrise.jpg.description: A wooden porch at sunrise, bathed in warm, golden light, features several wooden chairs and a hammock. The deck extends towards the ocean, with a wooden railing and a view of the horizon. The sky is clear with a few scattered clouds, and the sun casts long shadows on the deck.

photo_rainbowOBP.jpg.title: Rainbow From Outer Banks Pier
photo_rainbowOBP.jpg.description: A vibrant rainbow arcs gracefully across a blue sky, its vivid colors contrasting sharply with the surrounding clouds. The ocean below is a deep blue, with waves gently breaking on the shore, creating a frothy white foam. The scene is bathed in the soft, warm light of either sunrise or sunset, casting a golden hue over the entire landscape.

photo_rainbowsummersurf.jpg.title: Rainbow Over Summer Surf
photo_rainbowsummersurf.jpg.description: A double rainbow arches over a sandy beach with crashing waves in the background. The sky is partly cloudy, with the sun partially obscured by the clouds, casting a soft, diffused light over the scene. The ocean is a deep blue-green, and the sand is a light beige color.

photo_RIMfog2.jpg.title: Roanoke Island Marsh and Fog #2
photo_RIMfog2.jpg.description: A serene marsh landscape shrouded in fog, with a small pond reflecting the misty sky. The mist creates a soft, ethereal atmosphere, and the trees in the background are partially obscured by the fog. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting either early morning or late evening.

photo_romarshlight2.jpg.title: Roanoke Marshes Light - Manteo, NC
photo_romarshlight2.jpg.description: A small lighthouse stands on a dock at dusk, its warm lights reflecting on the calm water. The sky is a gradient of deep blue to purple, and the dock is illuminated by several lanterns, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_roughOI.jpg.title: Rough Morning at Oregon Inlet
photo_roughOI.jpg.description: Two fishing boats are stranded on a sandy beach, their reflections mirrored in the wet sand. The sky is a clear blue with wispy clouds, and the ocean waves are crashing onto the shore. The scene is serene and slightly melancholic, capturing a moment of stillness in the midst of nature's constant motion.

photo_runningwild.jpg.title: Running Wild
photo_runningwild.jpg.description: A group of wild horses gallops across a sandy dune, their hooves kicking up spray as they run. The horses are silhouetted against a bright, clear sky, creating a striking contrast. The scene is set on a beach with dunes in the background, and the light suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_shelly2.jpg.title: Shelly Island at Cape Hatteras #2
photo_shelly2.jpg.description: An aerial view of Shelly Island at Cape Hatteras, showcasing a long, narrow strip of land extending into the ocean. The island is bordered by clear, turquoise waters on one side and a sandy beach on the other. The coastline is marked by a series of small, rocky outcrops and a winding path that leads to the beach. The sky is clear, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_shipwreckstars.jpg.title: Shipwreck Under The Stars #1
photo_shipwreckstars.jpg.description: A shipwreck sits on a sandy beach under a starry sky, with the Milky Way stretching across the horizon. The scene is illuminated by the soft glow of the moon and distant lights, creating a serene and tranquil atmosphere.

photo_snowbeachcottage3.jpg.title: Snow & Beach Cottage #3
photo_snowbeachcottage3.jpg.description: A rustic beach cottage with a green roof and wooden porch stands amidst a snowy landscape. The cottage is surrounded by sand dunes, and the sky is clear and blue, suggesting a cold winter day. The snow covers the ground and the cottage's roof, creating a serene and tranquil atmosphere.

photo_solitudemarsh.jpg.title: Solitude of the Marsh
photo_solitudemarsh.jpg.description: A lone kayaker paddles across a calm, mist-covered marsh at dawn. The sky is painted with hues of orange and pink, reflecting off the still water. The kayaker's silhouette is barely visible against the soft light, creating a sense of solitude and tranquility.

photo_stallionfight.jpg.title: Wild Stallions Fighting
photo_stallionfight.jpg.description: Two wild stallions are engaged in a dynamic fight on a sandy beach. The horse on the left is rearing up, its front legs off the ground, while the horse on the right is kicking out with its hind legs. The ocean waves crash in the background, creating a sense of motion and energy.

photo_summerdaySNH.jpg.title: Summer Day in South Nags Head
photo_summerdaySNH.jpg.description: A sandy beach scene with a wooden fence in the foreground, leading to a pier in the background. The sky is clear with a few clouds, and the grasses in the foreground are swaying in the wind. The ocean is visible behind the pier, and the overall mood is calm and serene.

photo_summerdunesseaoats.jpg.title: Summer Dunes and Sea Oats
photo_summerdunesseaoats.jpg.description: A serene beach scene with golden sea oats swaying in the breeze, casting shadows on the pristine white sand. In the distance, a few beachgoers can be seen under blue umbrellas, enjoying the sunny day. The clear blue sky above adds to the tranquil atmosphere.

photo_timingsets.jpg.title: Timing the Sets
photo_timingsets.jpg.description: A lone surfer stands on a sandy beach, holding a surfboard, as waves gently break in the distance. The scene is bathed in soft, golden light, creating a serene and contemplative atmosphere.

photo_tumultpastel.jpg.title: Tumult in Pastel
photo_tumultpastel.jpg.description: A dramatic wave crashes against the shore, its crest breaking into a frothy spray. The ocean is a deep blue, contrasting with the warm, pastel hues of the sky, which transitions from a soft orange to a pale yellow. The scene is dynamic, capturing the raw power of the sea at sunset.

photo_wildhorsesfogbank.jpg.title: Wild Horses in Fog Bank
photo_wildhorsesfogbank.jpg.description: A group of wild horses stands on a sandy beach, their coats glistening with wetness. The ocean waves roll in the background, creating a serene and natural setting. The horses appear to be in motion, possibly walking or grazing, with their manes and tails flowing in the breeze.

photo_windowocean.jpg.title: Window on the Ocean
photo_windowocean.jpg.description: A view from a window overlooking a sandy beach with the ocean in the background. The window is framed by blue and white checkered curtains, and the view shows a clear sky with a few clouds, suggesting a calm day. The beach is sandy with some patches of grass, and the ocean waves are gently crashing onto the shore.

photo_wrightsnow.jpg.title: Wright Brothers Memorial in Snow - 2018
photo_wrightsnow.jpg.description: A snow-covered tree with bare branches stretches across the frame, its branches reaching out towards the sky. In the background, a distant structure, possibly a monument or a tower, stands out against the white, snowy landscape. The scene is serene and quiet, with the snow creating a soft, white blanket over the ground and the tree.

photo_prayingmantis.jpg.title: Praying Mantis
photo_prayingmantis.jpg.description: A common green praying mantis (Mantis religiosa) is positioned centrally, its bright green exoskeleton and folded forelegs held in a characteristic 'praying' posture. The background features soft, blurred tones of green and dark gray, illuminated by bright natural daylight that accentuates the insect's textured body and delicate antennae. The photograph captures a still moment with the mantis alert, head raised, as if observing its surroundings.

photo_redfox10.jpg.title: Red Fox
photo_redfox10.jpg.description: A red fox lies on a patch of dry brown grass with scattered green weeds, its orange fur and white muzzle contrasting against the earthy tones of the field. Warm late-afternoon light illuminates the scene, casting soft shadows and highlighting the fox's alert posture as it gazes directly toward the camera.

photo_oldOIstation.jpg.title: Old Oregon Inlet Station
photo_oldOIstation.jpg.description: A weathered brick lifesaving station with white trim and a tall observation tower stands on a sandy beach, surrounded by low green dunes. The structure features multiple windows, a covered porch, and a long wooden pier extending into the blue water beneath a bright sky dotted with fluffy white clouds. Midday sunlight illuminates the scene, casting soft shadows on the sand and highlighting the building’s brown tones against the vibrant blue sky.

photo_piratescove.jpg.title: Pirate's Cove Marina
photo_piratescove.jpg.description: A marina filled with docked white and red fishing boats extends into calm water, with wooden piers lining the water’s edge. A person wearing a blue shirt stands on one vessel, facing the water, as soft daylight from late morning illuminates the scene. The coastal setting, indicated by the title as Pirate's Cove Marina, suggests the Outer Banks region.

photo_portsmouthdunescape.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Dunescape
photo_portsmouthdunescape.jpg.description: Sand dunes covered in sparse beach grass stretch toward a calm ocean under a soft sunrise sky. Warm, low-angle light bathes the pale sand in golden tones, contrasting with the green of the grass and the blue hues of the sky and sea. This quiet moment at Portsmouth Island captures the gentle slopes of the dunes meeting the water at dawn.

photo_pelicanstrawlersunset.jpg.title: Pelicans and Trawler at Sunset
photo_pelicanstrawlersunset.jpg.description: Pelicans glide gracefully across the calm waters of the ocean, their silhouettes standing out against the vibrant backdrop of a setting sun. A distant trawler, its silhouette barely visible, sails peacefully in the distance, its wake trailing behind it. The sky is painted with hues of deep orange and pink, casting a warm glow over the entire scene.

photo_peaislandmarshburn.jpg.title: Pea Island Marsh Burn
photo_peaislandmarshburn.jpg.description: A vast marsh stretches towards the horizon, its golden reeds swaying gently in the breeze. A plume of thick, dark smoke rises dramatically from the marsh, billowing into the bright blue sky. The scene is bathed in the warm, golden light of either early morning or late afternoon, casting long shadows and highlighting the contrast between the serene marsh and the chaotic fire.

photo_snowgreencanal.jpg.title: Snow Over Green Canal
photo_snowgreencanal.jpg.description: A serene winter scene captures a snow-covered forest with bare trees reflecting in a still, greenish canal. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting a calm, early morning or late afternoon. The snow clings to the branches, creating a delicate, frosty texture against the vibrant green water below.

photo_PIchurchstartrails.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Church and Star Trails
photo_PIchurchstartrails.jpg.description: A quaint church stands under a starry sky, its silhouette framed by the swirling trails of star trails. The church's steeples and windows are illuminated, casting a soft glow against the dark, star-filled backdrop.

photo_sunriseportsmouthI.jpg.title: Sunrise on Portsmouth Island
photo_sunriseportsmouthI.jpg.description: A serene sunset over a small, white church nestled among tall grasses and reeds. The sun sets behind the church, casting a warm, golden light that reflects off the water in the foreground, creating a tranquil and peaceful scene.

photo_whitepelicansPIR.jpg.title: White Pelicans at Pea Island Refuge #1
photo_whitepelicansPIR.jpg.description: A group of white pelicans is gathered in a shallow body of water, their long, curved beaks and white feathers creating a striking contrast against the blue water. The pelicans are engaged in various activities, some standing still while others appear to be preening or interacting with each other. The setting is a natural, serene environment, likely a wetland or marsh, with the water reflecting the light, creating a tranquil and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_merchantsinfrared.jpg.title: Merchant's Millpond in Infrared
photo_merchantsinfrared.jpg.description: A majestic tree stands tall in the center of a serene pond, its branches reaching out towards the sky. The water is calm, reflecting the tree and the surrounding trees, creating a mirror-like effect. The scene is bathed in a soft, diffused light, giving it a dreamy, almost ethereal quality.

photo_silverlakeO.jpg.title: Silver Lake on Ocracoke
photo_silverlakeO.jpg.description: An aerial view of Silver Lake on Ocracoke, showcasing a serene marina with several boats docked along the waterfront. The surrounding area is lush with greenery, and the water reflects the clear blue sky, creating a peaceful and picturesque scene.

photo_baldeaglebeach.jpg.title: Eagle on the Beach
photo_baldeaglebeach.jpg.description: A bald eagle is captured in mid-flight on a sandy beach, its wings spread wide. The bird's feathers are a mix of dark brown and white, with a striking yellow beak and sharp claws. The background features a blurred ocean with waves crashing onto the shore, suggesting a coastal location.

photo_sunriseoverwash.jpg.title: Sunrise Overwash
photo_sunriseoverwash.jpg.description: A serene sunset over a coastal wetland, with the sun setting low on the horizon, casting a warm, golden glow over the water. The wetland is filled with shallow pools and ripples, reflecting the sunlight and creating a tranquil, reflective scene.

photo_wavescollidingCH.jpg.title: Waves Colliding at Cape Hatteras
photo_wavescollidingCH.jpg.description: A powerful wave crashes against the shore at Cape Hatteras, creating a dramatic splash of water. The golden light of the setting or rising sun illuminates the scene, casting a warm glow over the crashing waves and the sandy beach beyond.

photo_pelicansbeach2020.jpg.title: Pelicans on the Beach
photo_pelicansbeach2020.jpg.description: A group of pelicans stands on a sandy beach, their long, curved beaks and greyish-brown feathers contrasting with the light blue water in the background. The pelicans appear to be in a relaxed state, possibly preening or observing their surroundings. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_BILinfrared1.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light in Infrared #1
photo_BILinfrared1.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands prominently in the distance, its silhouette sharply defined against a golden, almost surreal sky. The surrounding landscape is a mix of reeds and grasses, bathed in the warm, infrared glow that gives everything a ghostly, ethereal appearance. A wooden walkway leads towards the lighthouse, inviting viewers to imagine stepping into this otherworldly scene.

photo_holidaywreath.jpg.title: Holiday Wreath
photo_holidaywreath.jpg.description: A festive holiday wreath adorned with various natural elements such as pine cones, feathers, and dried grasses is displayed against a teal shutter. The wreath is vibrant and colorful, featuring a mix of earthy tones and natural textures.

photo_backscratcher.jpg.title: Back Scratcher
photo_backscratcher.jpg.description: A black bear stands on its hind legs, scratching its back against a wooden post. The bear's fur is dark and glossy, contrasting with the green grass and trees in the background. The scene is set in a natural, outdoor environment, possibly a wildlife reserve or park, with a calm river visible in the distance. The lighting suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with soft, warm light illuminating the scene.

photo_autumngourds.jpg.title: Autumn Gourds
photo_autumngourds.jpg.description: A vibrant display of autumn gourds in various shapes and colors, including orange, green, and blue, arranged in a pile. The gourds have a textured, bumpy surface, and some have elongated, striped patterns. The setting appears to be an outdoor market or a harvest display, with natural light illuminating the gourds.

photo_ospreyhunting.jpg.title: Osprey Hunting a Fish
photo_ospreyhunting.jpg.description: An osprey is captured in mid-flight over a calm body of water, its wings spread wide. The bird is holding a fish in its talons, and its feathers are ruffled, indicating movement. The water reflects the osprey and the surrounding environment, creating a mirror effect. The lighting suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with warm tones illuminating the scene.

photo_guardianofnight.jpg.title: Guardian Of The Night
photo_guardianofnight.jpg.description: A tall, striped lighthouse stands prominently against a starry night sky, its beam piercing the darkness. The lighthouse's white and black stripes create a striking contrast against the deep blue of the night, while a small window on the upper level glows softly. The surrounding area is dark, with a faint outline of trees and a white fence in the foreground.

photo_bouncingbabyboy.jpg.title: Bouncing Baby Boy
photo_bouncingbabyboy.jpg.description: A young brown horse is galloping across a sandy beach, its hooves kicking up sand as it runs. The horse's mane is dark and stands up, and its tail is swishing behind it. The beach is dotted with patches of green vegetation and small yellow flowers, and the light suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_springlandscape.jpg.title: Spring Landscape
photo_springlandscape.jpg.description: A vibrant spring landscape features a field of bright yellow flowers in the foreground, transitioning into a row of trees in full bloom. The trees display a variety of colors, including pink, red, and white, creating a colorful and lively scene. The sunlight filters through the blossoms, casting a warm glow over the entire scene.

photo_PIsepia.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Church in Sepia Tone
photo_PIsepia.jpg.description: A small, solitary church stands amidst a field of tall, grassy vegetation. The church is surrounded by a few trees, and the sky above is filled with dramatic clouds, suggesting a moody atmosphere. The image is in sepia tone, giving it a vintage, nostalgic feel.

photo_foggymanteo.jpg.title: Foggy Night in Manteo
photo_foggymanteo.jpg.description: A foggy night scene at a dock with a lighthouse emitting a beam of light. The water reflects the lights, creating a serene and tranquil atmosphere. The dock extends into the water, and the sky is dark, indicating it is either early morning or late evening.

photo_3baldeagles.jpg.title: Three Bald Eagles at Alligator River Refuge
photo_3baldeagles.jpg.description: Three bald eagles are captured in mid-flight over a wetland area. The eagles are spread out, with one flying low over the water, another in the air, and the third on the ground. The setting is a natural wetland with a blue water body and green vegetation in the background. The lighting suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with soft, warm light illuminating the scene.

photo_hawkonhunt.jpg.title: Hawk on the Hunt
photo_hawkonhunt.jpg.description: A hawk is captured in mid-flight, its wings spread wide as it descends towards the ground. The bird's feathers are a mix of brown and white, with black-tipped wings. The setting is a grassy field with tall, dry grasses, and in the background, there is a body of water reflecting the sky. The lighting suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with warm, golden hues illuminating the scene.

photo_snowgeesepair.jpg.title: Snow Geese Pair in Flight
photo_snowgeesepair.jpg.description: A snow goose is captured in mid-flight against a clear blue sky. The bird's wings are spread wide, showcasing a mix of white feathers with black tips. The goose's long, slender neck is extended, and its beak is pointed forward, indicating it is in motion.

photo_moonrisejennettes.jpg.title: Moonrise at Jennettes's Pier
photo_moonrisejennettes.jpg.description: A wooden pier extends into the ocean under a dark, cloudy sky. The pier is illuminated by several lights, casting a soft glow on the water's surface. The moon is visible in the sky, casting a faint light over the scene. The waves gently lap against the pier's edge, creating a serene and tranquil atmosphere.

photo_CPsunsetfisherman.jpg.title: Cape Point Sunset With Fisherman
photo_CPsunsetfisherman.jpg.description: A solitary fisherman stands on a sandy beach, casting his line into the ocean as waves crash onto the shore. The sky is a dramatic mix of deep blues and clouds, with a hint of sunlight breaking through, casting a warm glow over the scene. The waves are frothy and white, creating a dynamic and powerful atmosphere.

photo_summeratshore.jpg.title: Summer at the Shore
photo_summeratshore.jpg.description: A vibrant beach scene with a mix of blue and green umbrellas dotting the sandy shore. Tall beach grasses sway gently in the breeze, framing the view. The ocean stretches out to the horizon, meeting a partly cloudy sky with patches of blue and white clouds.

photo_angelwingshallows.jpg.title: Angel Wing in the Shallows
photo_angelwingshallows.jpg.description: A white shell lies partially submerged in shallow, clear water, its ridged surface glistening in the sunlight. The sand around it is wet and slightly disturbed, creating a natural, textured backdrop.

photo_hummingbirdmimosa.jpg.title: Hummingbird and Mimosa
photo_hummingbirdmimosa.jpg.description: A hummingbird is captured in mid-flight, its wings spread wide as it hovers near a pink flower. The background is a soft blur of green foliage, suggesting a lush, natural setting. The lighting is soft and natural, indicating either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_summeraftatBIL.jpg.title: Summer Afternoon at Bodie Island Light
photo_summeraftatBIL.jpg.description: A tall, black and white striped lighthouse stands prominently against a backdrop of fluffy white clouds and a clear blue sky. The lighthouse is surrounded by a white picket fence and a well-maintained green lawn. In the background, there is a small white building with a brown roof, and the landscape is dotted with trees. The scene is serene and picturesque, capturing the essence of a peaceful summer afternoon.

photo_beaconnight1.jpg.title: Beacon in the Night #1
photo_beaconnight1.jpg.description: A striking lighthouse stands tall against a starry night sky, its beam cutting through the darkness. The structure is adorned with black and white stripes, and a red base contrasts with the white upper section. The Milky Way galaxy is visible in the background, adding a cosmic touch to the scene. The lighthouse's light illuminates the surrounding area, casting a warm glow on the night.

photo_beaconnight2.jpg.title: Beacon in the Night #2
photo_beaconnight2.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall against a starry night sky, its beam piercing the darkness. The Milky Way galaxy is visible in the background, adding a cosmic touch to the scene. The lighthouse's striped pattern contrasts sharply with the deep blue of the night sky.

photo_beaconnight3.jpg.title: Beacon in the Night #3
photo_beaconnight3.jpg.description: A tall, striped lighthouse stands prominently against a starry night sky, its beam cutting through the darkness. The lighthouse's white and black stripes create a striking contrast against the deep blue of the night, while the Milky Way galaxy is visible in the background, adding a sense of wonder and vastness to the scene.

photo_HLnightpanorama.jpg.title: Hatteras Light - Night Panorama
photo_HLnightpanorama.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands prominently against a starry night sky, its beam illuminating the surrounding area. The Milky Way arches overhead, creating a stunning celestial display. The lighthouse's structure is detailed, with a red and white striped pattern, and a small building is visible nearby. The scene is serene and peaceful, capturing the beauty of both terrestrial and cosmic elements.

photo_rockersnow.jpg.title: Rocker in the Snow
photo_rockersnow.jpg.description: A wooden rocker is covered in a light layer of snow, its shadow stretching across the snow-covered ground. The rocker is positioned on a wooden deck, with a wooden railing in the background. The setting appears to be a snowy outdoor area, possibly a beach or a coastal region, with a fence and some distant buildings visible in the background.

photo_sunsetliftoff.jpg.title: Sunset Liftoff
photo_sunsetliftoff.jpg.description: A flock of trumpeter swans is captured in mid-flight, their wings spread wide as they take off from a shallow body of water. The golden light of the setting sun bathes the scene in a warm, golden glow, highlighting the swans' elegant white plumage and the gentle ripples in the water. The swans are scattered across the frame, some in the foreground with wings fully extended, while others are in the background, their forms slightly blurred, creating a dynamic and lively scene.

photo_ocracokepointsunset.jpg.title: Ocracoke South Point Sunset
photo_ocracokepointsunset.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at sunset, with the sun casting a warm glow over the water and the sky. Two cars are parked on the sand, and a few people are walking along the shoreline. The clouds are reflected in the calm water, creating a mirror-like effect.

photo_piratesluckyones.jpg.title: Them That Dies Will Be The Lucky Ones
photo_piratesluckyones.jpg.description: A group of people dressed in period costumes are standing on the deck of a large, white sailing ship. They are raising their arms in the air, seemingly celebrating or performing a dance. The ship is docked in a harbor with other boats visible in the background. The sky is clear and the sunlight is bright, casting shadows on the deck.

photo_backscratching.jpg.title: Back Scratching
photo_backscratching.jpg.description: A black horse is lying on its back on a sandy beach, rolling around and scratching its back. The horse's legs are in the air, and it appears to be enjoying itself. The beach is sandy and the ocean waves can be seen in the background, creating a serene and playful atmosphere.

photo_CLLstarssepia.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Light Under the Stars - Sepia
photo_CLLstarssepia.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands prominently under a starry sky, its beam cutting through the darkness. The structure is illuminated in a striking pattern of black and white, casting a dramatic contrast against the night. To the left, a small, weathered building is visible, adding to the rustic charm of the scene. The Milky Way galaxy is faintly visible in the background, adding a sense of depth and wonder to the image.

photo_wildhorsesdunes.jpg.title: Wild Horses on the Dunes
photo_wildhorsesdunes.jpg.description: A group of wild horses graze on the sandy dunes under a bright blue sky dotted with fluffy white clouds. The horses, with their brown coats, are scattered across the landscape, some standing and others lying down, all engaged in feeding on the sparse vegetation. The scene is tranquil and natural, capturing the essence of these animals in their natural habitat.

photo_pungolakesunset1.jpg.title: Sunset at Pungo Lake #1
photo_pungolakesunset1.jpg.description: A serene sunset at Pungo Lake, with a flock of birds flying in formation against a backdrop of orange and blue hues. The trees reflect in the calm water, creating a mirror-like effect. The sky is clear with a few wispy clouds, and the overall mood is peaceful and tranquil.

photo_swansliftingoff2.jpg.title: Swans Lifting Off #2
photo_swansliftingoff2.jpg.description: A group of white swans is seen lifting off from a blue body of water. The swans are in various stages of takeoff, with some wings fully extended and others still in the process of lifting off. The water is splashing around them, indicating the force of their movements. The background features a line of tall, bare trees, suggesting a late autumn or early winter setting. The lighting is natural, with the sun casting a warm glow over the scene.

photo_kiteslights16.jpg.title: Kites With Lights!
photo_kiteslights16.jpg.description: A vibrant kite display features a large, colorful structure with red, blue, and green lights. The structure is illuminated with long, streaky lights, creating a dynamic and visually striking effect. The scene is set against a dark sky, with silhouettes of people standing below, observing the spectacle. The lights create a rainbow-like effect, adding to the festive and magical atmosphere.

photo_wavesCH1.jpg.title: Waves at Cape Hatteras #1
photo_wavesCH1.jpg.description: Two massive waves crash together in a powerful display of nature's force. The waves are frothy and white, with a yellowish hue at the base, indicating the presence of sand or sunlight. The sky is overcast, suggesting a stormy or windy day. The ocean is choppy, with small waves breaking around the main waves.

photo_fallNHW.jpg.title: Fall in Nags Head Woods
photo_fallNHW.jpg.description: The image captures a vibrant autumn scene in Nags Head Woods, with trees displaying a mix of yellow, orange, and green leaves. The sky is clear and blue, providing a beautiful backdrop to the colorful foliage. The perspective is from below, looking up at the trees, creating a sense of depth and scale.

photo_lateaftnags.jpg.title: Late Afternoon at Nags Head Pier
photo_lateaftnags.jpg.description: A wooden pier extends into the ocean, with waves crashing against the shore. The sky is filled with fluffy, white clouds, and the sun casts a warm, golden light over the scene. The beach is sandy, and the water is a mix of blue and white, indicating a strong wave action.

photo_alligatoralligator.jpg.title: Alligator River Refuge Alligator
