photo_alligatoralligator.jpg.description: An alligator swims gracefully through the clear, shallow waters of a river, its eyes visible above the surface. The water is calm, reflecting the surrounding greenery and the sunlight filtering through the leaves. The alligator's scales glisten in the dappled light, creating a serene and natural scene.

photo_redfoxkits.jpg.title: Red Fox and Kits
photo_redfoxkits.jpg.description: A red fox and its kits are nestled together in a sandy area surrounded by tall grass and shrubs. The kits are small and fluffy, with one kits resting on the fox's back, while the other stands nearby. The fox has a reddish-brown coat with a white underbelly and black-tipped ears.

photo_whaleheadclubSS.jpg.title: Whalehead Club at Sunset
photo_whaleheadclubSS.jpg.description: A grand, two-story house with a prominent front porch and multiple chimneys stands on a grassy lawn. The sky is painted with vibrant hues of orange, pink, and purple, indicating a sunset. The house is bathed in the warm, golden light of the setting sun, creating a serene and picturesque scene.

photo_prismocean.jpg.title: Prism in the Ocean
photo_prismocean.jpg.description: A powerful wave crashes in the ocean, creating a rainbow effect as it breaks. The wave's crest is curling over, and the spray from the wave forms a vivid arc of colors in the air.

photo_SBoffshorewind.jpg.title: Shore Break in Offshore Wind
photo_SBoffshorewind.jpg.description: A powerful wave breaks in the ocean, its crest curling over in a dramatic display of nature's force. The wave's inner core is a mesmerizing swirl of blue and green, while the outer edge is a frothy white foam. The sunlight casts a warm, golden glow on the scene, enhancing the vivid colors of the water and the wave's dynamic motion.

photo_E2christmas.jpg.title: Elizabeth II at Christmas
photo_E2christmas.jpg.description: A historical sailing ship, illuminated with blue lights, is docked at night. The ship's reflection is clearly visible on the calm water, creating a symmetrical image. The ship's sails are lit up, adding to the festive atmosphere.

photo_ridersstorm.jpg.title: Riders on the Storm
photo_ridersstorm.jpg.description: A group of kite surfers navigate the choppy waters under a stormy sky, their colorful kites dancing in the wind. The sea is a mix of deep blues and greens, with whitecaps indicating the rough conditions. The sky is dark with heavy clouds, suggesting an impending storm.

photo_PIchurchspring.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Church in Spring
photo_PIchurchspring.jpg.description: A quaint white church with a green roof and steeple stands in a grassy field, surrounded by a white picket fence. Pink flowers bloom in the foreground, adding a touch of color to the scene. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_snowegretbreed.jpg.title: Snowy Egret in Breeding Plumage
photo_snowegretbreed.jpg.description: A snowy egret stands gracefully on a branch, its white feathers ruffled and its long, blue beak pointing upwards. The background is a lush, green foliage, suggesting a natural, possibly coastal environment. The light is soft and diffused, indicating either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_swanshalfmoon.jpg.title: Swans & Half Moon
photo_swanshalfmoon.jpg.description: A group of swans is flying in formation against a clear blue sky. The moon is visible in the background, partially illuminated and casting a soft glow. The swans are spread out, some higher and some lower in the sky, creating a dynamic and graceful scene.

photo_sunsetblueoak.jpg.title: Sunset & Blue Oak
photo_sunsetblueoak.jpg.description: A serene sunset scene with a tree silhouetted against the sky, its branches reaching out over a calm body of water. The sun is setting on the horizon, casting a warm, orange glow that reflects off the water's surface. The sky is a gradient of deep blues and purples, creating a tranquil and picturesque atmosphere.

photo_sunflowerfield.jpg.title: Sunflower Field
photo_sunflowerfield.jpg.description: A vibrant sunflower field bathed in the warm glow of the setting sun, with sunflowers in various stages of bloom. The golden hue of the sun contrasts beautifully with the greenery, creating a serene and picturesque scene.

photo_rainbowinsummer1.jpg.title: Rainbow in Summer #1
photo_rainbowinsummer1.jpg.description: A vibrant rainbow arcs gracefully across a clear sky, its vibrant colors contrasting against the backdrop of a serene ocean and sandy beach. The ocean waves gently lap against the shore, creating a soothing and tranquil scene.

photo_icedchairs.jpg.title: Iced Chairs
photo_icedchairs.jpg.description: Two wooden Adirondack chairs, covered in a thick layer of ice, sit on a sandy beach. The chairs are positioned side by side, with a small table between them. The ocean waves crash against the shore, creating a dynamic and somewhat eerie scene. The sky is clear, suggesting it might be early morning or late afternoon.

photo_iceinroanokesound2.jpg.title: Ice in Roanoke Sound #2
photo_iceinroanokesound2.jpg.description: A vast expanse of frozen water, with patches of ice and snow covering the surface. A long, straight line of ice extends across the scene, creating a striking contrast against the blue sky. The ice appears to be frozen in place, forming a grid-like pattern.

photo_iceinroanokesound1.jpg.title: Ice in Roanoke Sound #1
photo_iceinroanokesound1.jpg.description: A vast expanse of ice covers the surface of Roanoke Sound, creating a mesmerizing pattern of white and gray. The ice appears fragmented and irregular, with some areas forming small, rounded shapes. The surrounding water is a mix of blue and gray, with patches of open water visible through the ice. The sky above is clear and blue, suggesting a calm, possibly cold day.

photo_horseatsurfpool.jpg.title: Horse at Surf Pool
photo_horseatsurfpool.jpg.description: A brown horse is seen drinking from a shallow pool of water on a sandy beach. The horse's reflection is clearly visible in the water, creating a symmetrical image. The beach is wet from the tide, and the ocean waves can be seen in the background. The lighting suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with warm, golden hues illuminating the scene.

photo_frozenmarsh.jpg.title: Frozen Marsh
photo_frozenmarsh.jpg.description: A frozen marsh scene with patches of ice and snow covering the ground. The ice has small, round, white spots, possibly ice crystals or bubbles. The surrounding area is brown and appears to be covered in reeds or grasses. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting an overcast day.

photo_frostonjockeysridge2.jpg.title: Frost on Jockey's Ridge #2
photo_frostonjockeysridge2.jpg.description: The image captures the intricate patterns of frost on a sandy surface, likely a beach or dune. The frost forms delicate, wavy lines that create a mesmerizing abstract pattern. The colors are a mix of deep blue and pale yellow, suggesting the frost is reflecting the light in a way that highlights the texture and form of the frost-covered sand.

photo_frostonjockeysridge1.jpg.title: Frost on Jockey's Ridge #1
photo_frostonjockeysridge1.jpg.description: The image captures a close-up view of frost patterns on a sandy surface, creating a series of wavy lines in shades of yellow and blue. The frost appears to be settling on the sand, forming intricate patterns that resemble natural abstract art.

photo_fallinnagsheadwoods3.jpg.title: Fall in Nags Head Woods #3
photo_fallinnagsheadwoods3.jpg.description: A winding dirt path through a forest of tall trees, their leaves a vibrant mix of yellow and orange hues. The sky peeks through the canopy, a bright blue canvas that contrasts with the warm tones of the foliage. The light filters through the branches, casting dappled shadows on the path.

photo_fallinnagsheadwoods2.jpg.title: Fall In Nags Head Woods #2
photo_fallinnagsheadwoods2.jpg.description: A vibrant autumn scene in Nags Head Woods, where golden leaves blanket the trees, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The sunlight filters through the branches, casting a soft, golden glow that enhances the rich colors of the foliage.

photo_fallinnagsheadwoods1.jpg.title: Fall in Nags Head Woods #1
photo_fallinnagsheadwoods1.jpg.description: The image captures a vibrant autumn scene in Nags Head Woods, with trees displaying a mix of yellow, orange, and green leaves. The perspective is from below, looking up at the canopy, creating a sense of depth and scale. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_cloudoverroanokesound.jpg.title: Cloud over Roanoke Sound
photo_cloudoverroanokesound.jpg.description: A dramatic cloud formation looms over Roanoke Sound, its wispy tendrils stretching across the sky. The clouds are illuminated by the soft, diffused light of either early morning or late afternoon, casting a gentle glow on the scene below.

photo_bodieislandlightinsnow.jpg.title: Bodie Island Light in Snow #2
photo_bodieislandlightinsnow.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall in a snowy landscape, its white structure and blue top partially covered in snow. A small white building with a snow-covered roof is attached to the lighthouse, and a red brick path leads up to it. The sky is overcast, and the ground is blanketed in snow, creating a serene and wintry atmosphere.

photo_beachinsummer.jpg.title: Beach in Summer
photo_beachinsummer.jpg.description: A serene beach scene with golden sand meeting the turquoise ocean. Gentle waves lap against the shore, creating white foam. The sky is a clear blue with scattered clouds, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_promisespring.jpg.title: Promise of Spring
photo_promisespring.jpg.description: A vibrant display of tulips in various shades of pink and red, with some buds still closed, creating a soft, blurred effect. The flowers are set against a natural backdrop, possibly a garden or park, with a hint of greenery and possibly a fence or hedge in the background. The lighting suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with a warm, golden hue illuminating the petals.

photo_currsoundiced.jpg.title: Currituck Sound Iced Over
photo_currsoundiced.jpg.description: A frozen landscape of Currituck Sound, with icy patches covering the ground and waterways. The scene is dominated by shades of blue and white from the ice, contrasted by the brown and green hues of the surrounding vegetation.

photo_willetssurfwash1.jpg.title: Willets in Surf Wash #1
photo_willetssurfwash1.jpg.description: A group of willets is seen wading in the shallow surf at the edge of the ocean. The birds are walking along the shoreline, their legs and beaks partially submerged in the water. The light is warm and golden, suggesting either sunrise or sunset, casting a serene glow over the scene. The water is calm, with gentle waves lapping against the shore.

photo_CLstairwell1.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Stairwell #1
photo_CLstairwell1.jpg.description: A spiral staircase made of black metal is set against a backdrop of red brick walls. The staircase leads upwards, with the top of the spiral visible at the top of the image. The lighting is dim, with a single light source casting a greenish hue on the walls and the staircase. The moon is visible in the top left corner of the image, adding a serene and somewhat eerie atmosphere.

photo_CLstairwell2.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Stairwell #2
photo_CLstairwell2.jpg.description: A spiral staircase made of black metal is set against a backdrop of red brick walls. The staircase spirals upward, creating a sense of depth and perspective. The lighting is dim, casting shadows that accentuate the spiral's structure.

photo_currbeachA.jpg.title: Currituck Beach Aerial
photo_currbeachA.jpg.description: An aerial view of a coastal town, with a long stretch of sandy beach running parallel to the ocean. The beach is lined with houses and buildings, and the ocean waves crash onto the shore. The sky is partly cloudy, with patches of blue sky visible above the clouds. The town is surrounded by greenery, and the overall scene is serene and picturesque.

photo_CLaerial.jpg.title: Currituck Light Aerial
photo_CLaerial.jpg.description: An aerial view of a red brick lighthouse surrounded by dense green foliage. The lighthouse stands tall and solitary, with a small blue building adjacent to it. The surrounding trees are lush and vibrant, creating a natural canopy around the structure.

photo_CLlens2.jpg.title: Currituck Light Lens #2
photo_CLlens2.jpg.description: A close-up view of a lighthouse lens, showcasing intricate details and a rainbow effect. The lens is encased in a golden, reflective structure, with the ocean and sky visible in the background. The scene is bathed in warm, golden light, suggesting either sunrise or sunset.

photo_CLlens4.jpg.title: Currituck Light Lens #4
photo_CLlens4.jpg.description: The image captures a close-up view of a lighthouse lens, showcasing its intricate design and golden, reflective surface. The lens appears to be part of a larger structure, possibly a lighthouse, with a clear blue sky and some clouds visible in the background.

photo_CLlens5.jpg.title: Currituck Light Lens #5
photo_CLlens5.jpg.description: A close-up of a lighthouse lens, glowing with a warm, golden light. The lens is encased in a metallic frame with intricate designs, and the light casts a soft glow on the surrounding area, creating a serene and nostalgic atmosphere.

photo_CLlens6.jpg.title: Currituck Light Lens #6
photo_CLlens6.jpg.description: A close-up view of a lighthouse lens, showcasing its intricate glass prisms and reflective surfaces. The lens is illuminated from within, casting a warm, golden light that reflects off the glass, creating a mesmerizing pattern of colors. The lens appears to be part of a larger structure, possibly a lighthouse, with a metal frame visible around it.

photo_CLlens7.jpg.title: Currituck Light Lens #7
photo_CLlens7.jpg.description: A close-up view of a lighthouse lens, showcasing its intricate glass prisms and the warm, golden light emanating from the bulb inside. The lens is encased in a metallic frame, and the surrounding area is bathed in a soft, golden glow, suggesting either sunrise or sunset. The lens is positioned on a platform, with the ocean visible in the background, creating a serene and picturesque scene.

photo_daysendBW.jpg.title: Day's End at Oregon Inlet - B&W
photo_daysendBW.jpg.description: A row of boats is docked at a marina, their masts reaching towards a dramatic sky filled with large, fluffy clouds. The water is calm, reflecting the boats and the sky, creating a mirror-like effect.

photo_HIaerialsouth.jpg.title: Hatteras Island Aerial Looking South
photo_HIaerialsouth.jpg.description: An aerial view of Hatteras Island, looking south, showcasing a long, narrow strip of land bordered by the ocean on both sides. The land is covered with sparse vegetation and a road runs parallel to the coastline. The sky is clear with a few clouds, and the water is a deep blue, reflecting the sunlight.

photo_HLaerial3.jpg.title: Hatteras Light Aerial #3
photo_HLaerial3.jpg.description: An aerial view of the Hatteras Lighthouse, a tall, cylindrical structure with a distinctive black and white striped pattern. The lighthouse is surrounded by a lush, green forest and a sandy beach. The ocean waves can be seen crashing onto the shore in the background, creating a serene and picturesque coastal scene.

photo_kholerwreck.jpg.title: Kholer Wreck
photo_kholerwreck.jpg.description: A rusted shipwreck lies on a sandy beach, its wooden planks and metal framework partially buried in the sand. The shipwreck is surrounded by the ocean waves and dunes in the background, creating a dramatic and historical scene.

photo_sunriseNH2.jpg.title: Sunrise in Nags Head #2
photo_sunriseNH2.jpg.description: A vibrant sunset over a coastal landscape, with the sun partially obscured by a palm tree. The sky is a gradient of warm oranges and pinks, casting a serene glow over the scene. The silhouette of a fence and a distant silhouette of a building can be seen, adding depth to the image.

photo_sunriseNH3.jpg.title: Sunrise in Nags Head #3
photo_sunriseNH3.jpg.description: A vibrant sunset over the ocean, with the sun partially obscured by silhouetted palm fronds. The sky transitions from deep purples and oranges to a warm, fiery red near the horizon, creating a dramatic and tranquil scene.

photo_swansoverhead.jpg.title: Swans Overhead
photo_swansoverhead.jpg.description: A flock of white swans is captured in flight against a clear blue sky. The swans are spread out, some flying higher and others lower, creating a dynamic and graceful scene. The light suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, casting a soft glow on the birds.

photo_2wildhorses.jpg.title: Two Wild Horses - Vertical
photo_2wildhorses.jpg.description: Two wild horses stand in a shallow, reflective body of water, their reflections mirrored perfectly in the calm surface. The horses are grazing, their heads lowered to the ground. The sky above is a vibrant blue, dotted with fluffy white clouds, suggesting a clear, sunny day. The surrounding landscape is a vast, open field with patches of green grass and water, creating a serene and tranquil scene.

photo_whelksunrise1.jpg.title: Whelk at Sunrise #1
photo_whelksunrise1.jpg.description: A vibrant, orange and white whelk shell is partially buried in wet sand, surrounded by small bubbles. The sunlight filters through, casting a soft glow on the shell and the surrounding sand.

photo_whalebridgeSS.jpg.title: Whalehead Club Bridge at Sunset
photo_whalebridgeSS.jpg.description: A serene sunset scene at the Whalehead Club Bridge, where a couple stands on an arched wooden bridge over a calm body of water. The sky is painted with hues of orange, pink, and purple, reflecting beautifully on the water's surface. The silhouette of trees frames the scene, adding to the tranquil atmosphere.

photo_summersbeach.jpg.title: Summer's Beach
photo_summersbeach.jpg.description: A lone figure stands on a sandy beach, their red umbrella casting a shadow in the soft, golden light. The ocean waves gently lap against the shore, their greenish-blue water contrasting with the warm sand. The scene is peaceful and serene, capturing a moment of solitude and tranquility.

photo_colorsspring.jpg.title: Colors of Spring
photo_colorsspring.jpg.description: A vibrant display of tulips in full bloom, showcasing a mix of pink and yellow petals with a hint of purple. The flowers are set against a backdrop of blue hyacinths, creating a striking contrast of colors. The sunlight filters through, casting a warm glow on the petals and highlighting their delicate textures.

photo_HIaerial17.jpg.title: Hatteras Island Aerial #17
photo_HIaerial17.jpg.description: An aerial view of a sandy beach with a heart-shaped sandbar extending into the ocean. The beach is dotted with several vehicles and people, and the water is a vibrant blue-green, with white waves crashing onto the shore. The sky is clear with a few scattered clouds, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_skimgoldenpond.jpg.title: Skimmer on Golden Pond
photo_skimgoldenpond.jpg.description: A black skimmer bird is captured in mid-flight over a golden pond, its wings spread wide. The bird's distinctive black and white plumage contrasts sharply with the warm, golden hue of the water, which reflects the light, creating a serene and tranquil scene. The bird's red beak is visible as it glides gracefully over the water's surface.

photo_OIEtW.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet - East-to-West View
photo_OIEtW.jpg.description: An aerial view of the Oregon Inlet, showcasing a sandy beach leading into the ocean. A bridge spans the inlet, connecting two landmasses. The water is a vibrant blue-green, with whitecaps indicating a gentle breeze. A boat is visible in the distance, moving along the coastline.

photo_OLsnow1.jpg.title: Ocracoke Light In Snow #1
photo_OLsnow1.jpg.description: A ginger cat stands on a white picket fence, its tail curled over its back. The cat is positioned in front of a white lighthouse, which is partially obscured by snow. The lighthouse is surrounded by snow-covered trees and a clear blue sky. The scene is serene and picturesque, capturing a moment of calm in a snowy coastal setting.

photo_horsessurf.jpg.title: Horses in Surf
photo_horsessurf.jpg.description: Two brown horses are walking along a sandy beach, their hooves sinking slightly into the wet sand as they approach the ocean waves. The waves are gentle, with white foam at the crest, and the sky above is clear, suggesting a calm day.

photo_falllight.jpg.title: Hatteras Light - Fall Light
photo_falllight.jpg.description: A tall, striped lighthouse stands prominently against a partly cloudy sky, with a red and white striped pattern on its cylindrical structure. The lighthouse is surrounded by a grassy area with a small red building and a white fence in the foreground. The sky is a mix of blue and white clouds, suggesting a calm and clear day.

photo_OIfrom3000.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet From 3000'
photo_OIfrom3000.jpg.description: An aerial view of the Oregon Inlet showcases a vibrant coastal landscape with clear blue waters, sandy beaches, and lush green marshes. The scene is bathed in bright sunlight, highlighting the natural beauty and tranquility of the area.

photo_whaleheadducks.jpg.title: Whalehead Club and Ducks
photo_whaleheadducks.jpg.description: A grand, two-story house with a steeply pitched roof and multiple chimneys is situated on a lush, green lawn. The house is surrounded by tall grasses and trees, and a calm pond with ducks is in the foreground. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_stumpscurr.jpg.title: Stumps on Currituck Beach
photo_stumpscurr.jpg.description: A solitary tree stump stands precariously on the sandy beach, its roots exposed and tangled with the waves. The ocean stretches out to the horizon, with gentle waves lapping against the shore. The sky above is partly cloudy, casting a soft light over the scene.

photo_mornsurfcapepoint.jpg.title: Morning Surf at Cape Point
photo_mornsurfcapepoint.jpg.description: A man is wading through the shallow waves of the ocean at sunrise, casting his fishing rod into the water. The sky is a gradient of blue and orange hues, with fluffy clouds scattered across it. The beach is sandy and wet from the incoming tide, and the waves are breaking gently on the shore.

photo_CLightReflect.jpg.title: Currituck Light & Reflections
photo_CLightReflect.jpg.description: A tall, cylindrical lighthouse stands prominently in the distance, its silhouette sharply defined against a clear blue sky. The lighthouse is surrounded by lush green trees, and a small wooden shed is visible nearby. The scene is bathed in warm, golden light, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon. The water in the foreground reflects the lighthouse and the surrounding trees, creating a mirror-like effect.

photo_oysterCfeed.jpg.title: Oystercatcher Feeding
photo_oysterCfeed.jpg.description: An oystercatcher stands on a sandy beach, its beak open wide as it holds a small fish. The bird's black and white plumage contrasts sharply with the blue hues of the ocean in the background. The light suggests either early morning or late afternoon, casting a warm glow over the scene.

photo_foxtracks.jpg.title: Fox Tracks on Jockey's Ridge
photo_foxtracks.jpg.description: The image captures the intricate patterns of sand dunes, with small, circular indentations scattered across the surface. The dunes exhibit a golden hue, with the light casting shadows that enhance the texture and depth of the sand.

photo_jockeysgale.jpg.title: Jockey's Ridge in Gale
photo_jockeysgale.jpg.description: A vast expanse of golden sand dunes under a hazy, yellow sky, with gentle undulations in the sand. The scene is bathed in a warm, golden light, suggesting either sunrise or sunset, creating a serene and tranquil atmosphere.

photo_jockeys.jpg.title: Jockey's Ridge 1972
photo_jockeys.jpg.description: A vast expanse of golden sand dunes stretches across the landscape, their undulating forms creating a mesmerizing pattern. The sky above is a deep blue, with a few wispy clouds scattered across it, adding to the serene and tranquil atmosphere.

photo_snowdunesearly.jpg.title: Snowy Dunes and Early Morning Sun
photo_snowdunesearly.jpg.description: Snowy Dunes and Early Morning Sun.

photo_curiouscubs.jpg.title: Curious Cubs
photo_curiouscubs.jpg.description: Two bear cubs are perched high in a tree, their curious eyes peering out from behind the branches. The lush green foliage and the sunlight filtering through the leaves create a serene and natural setting. The cubs' dark fur contrasts with the vibrant green leaves, making them stand out.

photo_cropduster.jpg.title: Crop Duster
photo_cropduster.jpg.description: A yellow crop duster aircraft flies low over a cornfield, releasing a billowing plume of white spray that drifts behind it. The plane skims just above rows of green corn, with a dense tree line forming a dark backdrop under a hazy summer sky.

photo_bbbear.jpg.title: Big Black Bear
photo_bbbear.jpg.description: A large black bear stands on a paved road, its massive body and thick dark fur catching warm sunlight. The bear's mouth is slightly open, revealing its teeth, as it pauses mid-stride against a blurred background of autumn grasses and roadside vegetation.

photo_lightningoverRI.jpg.title: Lightning Over Roanoke Island
photo_lightningoverRI.jpg.description: A dramatic lightning bolt splits the purple-gray storm clouds over water near Roanoke Island, its bright white branches striking downward in multiple forks. The stormy sky glows with electric purple and blue light, while distant yellow lights from the shoreline dot the horizon across the dark water.

photo_babybears.jpg.title: Baby Bears
photo_babybears.jpg.description: Two black bear cubs stand in a patch of tall green grasses and wildflowers, their dark fur contrasting with the bright spring vegetation. One cub faces away while the other looks toward the camera, both appearing alert and curious in the soft, natural light of the meadow.

photo_sunsetunderoregoninletbridge.jpg.title: Sunset Under Oregon Inlet Bridge
photo_sunsetunderoregoninletbridge.jpg.description: The sun descends through the arched supports of the Oregon Inlet Bridge, casting an intense orange and red glow across the sky and water. The silhouetted bridge spans the frame horizontally, its rhythmic concrete pillars framing the fiery sunset, while calm water reflects the vivid colors in the foreground.

photo_snowbeachcottages2.jpg.title: Snow & Beach Cottages #2
photo_snowbeachcottages2.jpg.description: Snow-covered dunes sweep across a beach in winter, their white slopes streaked with patches of golden sand and dried beach grasses. Several weathered cottages with blue roofs stand along the dune line, silhouetted against a bright afternoon sky, with the Atlantic Ocean stretching along the left horizon.

photo_snowgeesePI.jpg.title: Snow Geese Pea Island
photo_snowgeesePI.jpg.description: A flock of snow geese fills the sky over Pea Island, their white bodies and black wingtips clearly visible as they descend in various stages of flight. The birds are captured mid-motion against a clear blue sky, some with wings fully extended, others with legs outstretched preparing to land, their orange-pink bills and feet adding warm tones to the composition.

photo_sunsetpungolake.jpg.title: Sunset at Pungo Lake
photo_sunsetpungolake.jpg.description: A golden sunset illuminates the calm waters of Pungo Lake, with flocks of waterfowl flying in long formations across a sky painted in shades of orange, pink, and blue. The silhouette of a wooded shoreline and dried marsh grasses frame the left side of the scene, their reflections shimmering in the still water below.

photo_snowshadowsncmts.jpg.title: Snow Shadows - NC Mts
photo_snowshadowsncmts.jpg.description: A serene winter scene in a snowy landscape, with bare trees standing against a backdrop of rolling hills. The sunlight casts long shadows of the trees onto the snow, creating a striking contrast between light and dark. The snow appears pristine and untouched, with a few small patches of grass peeking through here and there.

photo_englishgarden.jpg.title: An English Garden on the OBX
photo_englishgarden.jpg.description: A stone fountain with a classical statue stands in the center of a lush garden, surrounded by vibrant pink flowers and neatly trimmed hedges. The garden is bathed in soft, natural light, suggesting a peaceful, serene atmosphere.

photo_cormorantsbeach.jpg.title: Cormorants on the Beach
photo_cormorantsbeach.jpg.description: A flock of cormorants stands on the sandy beach, their feathers a mix of dark and light shades. The ocean waves crash in the background, creating a dynamic and lively scene. The light is soft, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_swansliftingoff.jpg.title: Swans Lifting Off
photo_swansliftingoff.jpg.description: Three swans are captured in mid-flight over a calm, reflective pond. The swans are silhouetted against the golden hues of the setting sun, which casts a warm glow over the scene. The background features a line of bare trees and a field of tall, dry grasses, suggesting a late autumn or early winter setting.

photo_snowbeachcottage1.jpg.title: Snow & Beach Cottage #1
photo_snowbeachcottage1.jpg.description: A cozy beach cottage with a wooden deck and a small window, surrounded by a mix of white and sandy dunes. The ocean waves gently roll in the background, and the sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_rainbowinsummer2.jpg.title: Rainbow in Summer #2
photo_rainbowinsummer2.jpg.description: A vibrant rainbow arcs across a clear sky, its colors vividly contrasting against the pale blue backdrop. The rainbow's arc spans from the top left to the bottom right, creating a striking visual effect. Below, the ocean stretches out in a calm, turquoise expanse, with gentle waves lapping at the shore. A solitary bird flies low over the water, adding a sense of movement and life to the serene scene.

photo_peaislanddunessandfence.jpg.title: Pea Island Dunes & Sand Fence
photo_peaislanddunessandfence.jpg.description: A serene beach scene with sandy dunes and a wooden fence running parallel to the shoreline. The dunes are covered in tall, green sea oats, and the ocean waves gently roll onto the shore. The sky is partly cloudy, with a few birds flying overhead. The overall mood is calm and peaceful.

photo_oldoregninletstationatnight.jpg.title: Old Oregn Inlet Station at Night
photo_oldoregninletstationatnight.jpg.description: A quaint, wooden house with a balcony and dormer windows stands on stilts in a sandy coastal area, bathed in the soft glow of moonlight. The sky above is a deep, starry blue, with the Milky Way stretching across the horizon, creating a breathtaking night sky.

photo_blackswallowmimosa.jpg.title: Black Swallowtails on a Mimosa
photo_blackswallowmimosa.jpg.description: Three black swallowtail butterflies are perched on delicate pink flowers of a mimosa tree. The butterflies are positioned in the upper middle portion of the image, with one butterfly flying above the flowers. The background is a clear blue sky, suggesting a sunny day. The flowers are in full bloom, with their light pink petals and green stems.

photo_dreamingwhitexmas.jpg.title: Dreaming of a White Christmas
photo_dreamingwhitexmas.jpg.description: A quaint red cabin sits nestled in a snowy landscape, surrounded by snow-covered trees and a wooden fence. The cabin is partially obscured by snow, giving it a cozy, winter feel. The sky is partly cloudy, with patches of blue peeking through, suggesting a cold but pleasant day.

photo_wilmalee.jpg.title: The Wilma Lee in Ocracoke
photo_wilmalee.jpg.description: A sailboat named 'The Wilma Lee' is docked at a marina, its mast rising above the water. The sky is painted with vibrant hues of pink and orange, suggesting either sunrise or sunset. The water reflects the colors, creating a serene and picturesque scene.

photo_blackneckedstiltmallard.jpg.title: Black-necked Stilt & Mallard
photo_blackneckedstiltmallard.jpg.description: A black-necked stilt stands in shallow water, its long legs and distinctive black neck contrasting with its pink legs. In the background, a mallard duck is partially visible, its green head and brown body blending with the water's surface. The scene is set in a calm, reflective pond, with the light suggesting either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_intosunset.jpg.title: Into the Sunset
photo_intosunset.jpg.description: A horse stands silhouetted against a vibrant sunset sky, its form sharply outlined against the warm hues of orange and yellow. The horse's mane and tail are visible, adding texture to the scene. The grassy foreground and the sky's gradient of colors create a striking contrast.

photo_buckeyegolden.jpg.title: Common Buckeye on Goldenrod
photo_buckeyegolden.jpg.description: A Common Buckeye butterfly perches on a cluster of vibrant yellow flowers, its wings displaying a striking pattern of orange, black, and white circles. The butterfly's wings are open, revealing its intricate design, while the flowers are in full bloom, creating a vivid and colorful scene.

photo_summerdunescape.jpg.title: Summer Dunescape
photo_summerdunescape.jpg.description: A serene beach scene with soft, white sand dunes and tall sea oats. The dunes are gently undulating, with intricate patterns etched into the sand. The sky is a soft, pastel blue, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon light. The sea oats stand tall and green, swaying slightly in the breeze.

photo_3dolphins.jpg.title: Aerial - 3 Dolphins
photo_3dolphins.jpg.description: Three dolphins are seen leaping out of the turquoise water, creating a splash as they move gracefully through the air. The sunlight casts a warm glow on the dolphins, highlighting their sleek, gray bodies against the vibrant backdrop of the ocean.

photo_bearsrainbow.jpg.title: Bears Under a Rainbow
photo_bearsrainbow.jpg.description: A group of bears is seen resting in a vast, golden wheat field under a vibrant rainbow. The bears are silhouetted against the sky, creating a striking contrast with the bright, colorful arc above them.

photo_CLstairwell3.jpg.title: Cape Lookout Stairwell #3
photo_CLstairwell3.jpg.description: A spiral staircase made of metal and brick, ascending through a dimly lit, circular structure. The light casts shadows and highlights the texture of the brick walls, creating a sense of depth and perspective.

photo_geesemtlake.jpg.title: Geese on Mountain Lake
photo_geesemtlake.jpg.description: Geese are swimming gracefully in a body of water, their reflections creating a mirror effect on the surface. The water is calm, with gentle ripples spreading outwards from the geese. The colors in the water are a mix of orange and blue, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon light.

photo_mattamuskeetmorning.jpg.title: Mattamuskeet Morning
photo_mattamuskeetmorning.jpg.description: A serene morning scene at Mattamuskeet National Wildlife Refuge, where a flock of white swans gracefully flies above a misty wetland. The soft light of dawn casts a gentle glow over the landscape, highlighting the tranquil beauty of the birds and the natural environment.

photo_morningfishermenpier.jpg.title: Morning Fishermen on the Pier
photo_morningfishermenpier.jpg.description: Three fishermen are silhouetted against a vibrant sunrise, casting their fishing rods into the calm ocean waters. The sun rises behind a pier, its warm glow reflecting off the water and creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.

photo_pelicanglidingsurf.jpg.title: Pelican Gliding Over Surf
photo_pelicanglidingsurf.jpg.description: A pelican is captured in mid-flight, its wings spread wide as it glides gracefully over the ocean waves. The pelican's beak is open, possibly in the process of catching a fish. The ocean below is a beautiful blend of blue and green hues, with gentle waves crashing onto the shore. The light suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, casting a warm glow over the scene.

photo_shellsOB.jpg.title: Shells from the Outer Banks
photo_shellsOB.jpg.description: A collection of colorful seashells from the Outer Banks is displayed, showcasing a variety of shapes and sizes. The shells are arranged in a pile, with some overlapping each other, creating a visually appealing and textured display.

photo_snowgeesesunset.jpg.title: Snow Geese at Sunset #2
photo_snowgeesesunset.jpg.description: A flock of snow geese is captured in mid-flight against a stunning sunset. The birds are silhouetted against the vibrant hues of the setting sun, which casts a warm, golden glow across the sky. The water below reflects the colors of the sky, creating a mirror effect. The geese are scattered across the frame, some flying higher and others lower, adding depth to the scene.
tags: geese flying at sunset sky water

photo_wildhorsesgrazing.jpg.title: Wild Horses Grazing
photo_wildhorsesgrazing.jpg.description: A group of wild horses is seen grazing in a shallow, reflective water body. The horses are drinking from the water, their reflections visible in the calm surface. The setting appears to be a coastal area with sandy shores and dunes in the background, under a partly cloudy sky.

photo_wildhorsetrotting.jpg.title: Wild Horse Trotting By
photo_wildhorsetrotting.jpg.description: A brown horse is galloping through a shallow, marshy area with water lilies. The horse's mane is tousled by the wind, and its hooves are partially submerged in the water. In the background, other horses are visible, walking or grazing in the same wetland. The sky is clear with a few clouds, suggesting a calm day.

photo_icicles.jpg.title: Icicles
photo_icicles.jpg.description: Icicles hang from a structure, their clear, crystalline forms glistening in the light. The background is a deep blue, possibly from a pool or a body of water, reflecting the icy formations. The scene is serene and cold, capturing the essence of a winter's day.

photo_solareclipse.jpg.title: Partial Solar Eclipse
photo_solareclipse.jpg.description: A partial solar eclipse casts a dramatic, fiery glow across the sky, with the sun partially obscured by clouds. A bird is silhouetted against the intense orange and yellow hues, adding a sense of motion and drama to the scene.

photo_horsescarrot.jpg.title: Wild Horses at Carrot Island, NC
photo_horsescarrot.jpg.description: Two wild horses are grazing in a vast, reflective wetland. The sky above is a brilliant blue, dotted with fluffy white clouds, creating a serene and tranquil atmosphere. The water's surface mirrors the horses and the sky, adding a sense of symmetry and calmness to the scene.

photo_snowgeeseSS.jpg.title: Snow Geese at Sunset #1
photo_snowgeeseSS.jpg.description: A large flock of snow geese is captured in flight against a backdrop of a golden sunset. The birds are scattered across the sky, some flying higher and others lower, creating a dynamic and lively scene. The warm hues of the setting sun bathe the geese in a soft, golden light, enhancing the natural beauty of the moment.

photo_katiasurf1.jpg.title: Katia Surf #1
photo_katiasurf1.jpg.description: A surfer rides a powerful wave on a vibrant green surfboard, their arms outstretched in a triumphant gesture. The wave crashes behind them, creating a frothy white spray. In the background, a wooden pier extends into the ocean, with several people standing on it, watching the surfer. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting it is either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_kitesunset.jpg.title: Kiteboarders at Sunset
photo_kitesunset.jpg.description: Kiteboarders soar through the air above the ocean at sunset, their silhouettes against the vibrant backdrop of the setting sun. The sky is a gradient of warm oranges and yellows, transitioning into a deep blue as it meets the horizon. The water below reflects the colors of the sky, creating a mesmerizing mirror effect.

photo_snowfallBW.jpg.title: Snowfall in Black and White
photo_snowfallBW.jpg.description: A serene winter scene in a park, where snow blankets the ground and trees stand bare, their branches reaching upwards. The foggy atmosphere adds a sense of mystery and tranquility to the scene, with the light filtering through the trees, creating a soft, diffused illumination.

photo_snowbeachgrass.jpg.title: Snow and Beach Grass
photo_snowbeachgrass.jpg.description: A small patch of beach grass emerges from a mound of snow, its slender, light brown leaves standing out against the white blanket. The snow is undisturbed, with only a few footprints nearby, suggesting recent activity. The grass is partially covered in snow, with some areas exposed, revealing the texture of the grass and the smooth, undulating surface of the snow.

photo_skimreflection.jpg.title: Skimmer and Reflection
photo_skimreflection.jpg.description: A black skimmer bird is captured in mid-flight over a sandy beach, its wings spread wide. The bird's white underbelly contrasts with its dark wings and head, and its bright orange beak stands out. The reflection of the bird is visible in the wet sand below, creating a mirror image. The beach is sandy and appears to be at low tide, with the ocean in the background.

photo_icesoundshore.jpg.title: Ice on Sound Shore
photo_icesoundshore.jpg.description: A serene winter scene at the sound shore, where the icy blue water meets the frothy white foam of melting ice. The golden grasses and reeds along the shore contrast with the cold, clear water, creating a tranquil and picturesque winter landscape.

photo_horsescurrbeach.jpg.title: Horses on Currituck Beach
photo_horsescurrbeach.jpg.description: Two chestnut horses stand side by side on a sandy beach, their manes and tails flowing in the wind. The ocean waves crash in the background, creating a dynamic and natural setting. The horses appear calm and relaxed, with the soft light of either early morning or late afternoon casting a gentle glow over the scene.

photo_horsessnow1.jpg.title: Horses in Snow #1
photo_horsessnow1.jpg.description: Three horses stand in a snowy field in front of a red barn. The horses are brown and black, with one horse having a white blaze on its face. The snow is deep and white, covering the ground and the horses' feet. The barn has a window and a snow-covered roof, indicating a cold, wintry day.

photo_HLsnowCU.jpg.title: Hatteras Light in Snowfall - Close-up
photo_HLsnowCU.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall in a snowy landscape, its black and white striped pattern contrasting sharply with the white snow. The structure is adorned with red accents, and the surrounding area is blanketed in snow, creating a serene and wintry atmosphere.

photo_HLbasesnow.jpg.title: Hatteras Light Base in Snowfall
photo_HLbasesnow.jpg.description: A historic lighthouse base stands in the snow, its structure partially covered in a blanket of white. The steps leading up to the entrance are partially obscured by the falling snow, creating a serene and tranquil winter scene.

photo_HLsnowfall6.jpg.title: Hatteras Light After Snowfall #6
photo_HLsnowfall6.jpg.description: A lighthouse stands tall amidst a snowy landscape, its black and white striped pattern contrasting sharply against the blue sky. The trees surrounding the lighthouse are heavily laden with snow, creating a serene and picturesque winter scene.

photo_HLsnowfall5.jpg.title: Hatteras Light After Snowfall #5
photo_HLsnowfall5.jpg.description: A snow-covered tree frames a lighthouse, its black and white striped pattern standing out against a clear blue sky. The branches are heavy with snow, creating a serene winter scene.

photo_HLsnowfall4.jpg.title: Hatteras Light After Snowfall #4
photo_HLsnowfall4.jpg.description: A snow-covered tree frame the view of a lighthouse, its black and white striped pattern standing out against the bright blue sky. The snow blankets the branches and leaves, creating a serene winter scene.

photo_HLsnowfall1.jpg.title: Hatteras Light After Snowfall #1
photo_HLsnowfall1.jpg.description: A striped lighthouse stands tall against a vibrant sunset, its colors transitioning from deep orange to soft pink. Snow blankets the ground and surrounding vegetation, creating a serene winter scene. The lighthouse's light is on, casting a warm glow that contrasts with the cool tones of the sky and snow.

photo_dunefield4.jpg.title: Dune Field #4
photo_dunefield4.jpg.description: A serene beach scene with sand dunes covered in grasses and wildflowers. The sky is partly cloudy with patches of blue, and the ocean waves gently roll onto the shore. The dunes are gently illuminated by the soft light of either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_angeldarksand.jpg.title: Angel Wing Shell on Dark Sand
photo_angeldarksand.jpg.description: A white, textured shell lies on dark, wet sand, its ridges and edges clearly visible. The shell is partially buried, with only the top part protruding above the sand. The lighting casts a soft shadow of the shell onto the sand, highlighting its intricate patterns.

photo_dunesunset.jpg.title: Dunescape at Sunset
photo_dunesunset.jpg.description: Golden sand dunes stretch across the landscape, their undulating forms bathed in the warm glow of the setting sun. The dunes are dotted with patches of tall, golden grass that sway gently in the breeze. The sky above is a canvas of soft, pastel hues, transitioning from a deep blue at the top to a warm orange near the horizon, casting long shadows across the dunes.

photo_capepointfish.jpg.title: Cape Point Fishermen
photo_capepointfish.jpg.description: A group of fishermen stands in shallow water, casting their rods into the ocean waves. The sky is clear with a soft blue hue, suggesting early morning or late afternoon light. The fishermen are dressed in waterproof gear, and the waves create a dynamic, foamy texture around them.

photo_OIchanchart.jpg.title: Oregon Inlet Channels & Charters
photo_OIchanchart.jpg.description: Aerial view of the Oregon Inlet Channels & Charters, showcasing a sandy beach leading into the ocean. The water is a vibrant turquoise, with boats leaving trails in the clear, shallow waters. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day.

photo_blackskimmer.jpg.title: Black Skimmer Skimming
photo_blackskimmer.jpg.description: A black skimmer bird is seen flying low over a sandy beach, its wings spread wide. The bird's beak is pointed downwards, possibly in search of food. The beach is covered with blue tarps, and several other birds are visible in the background, some standing and others flying. The lighting suggests it is either early morning or late afternoon, with soft, warm light illuminating the scene.

photo_hollowwaves.jpg.title: Hollow Waves
photo_hollowwaves.jpg.description: Two large, hollow waves crash against the shore, creating a dramatic display of white foam and spray. The waves are a mix of deep blue and green, with the foam appearing white and frothy. The scene is set on a beach with the ocean stretching out into the horizon.

photo_oakroanoke.jpg.title: Oak Over Roanoke Sound
photo_oakroanoke.jpg.description: A solitary oak tree stands on the shore of Roanoke Sound, its branches reaching out over the water. The sun sets in the background, casting a warm, golden light that bathes the scene in a soft, serene glow. The water is calm, reflecting the tree and the sky, creating a tranquil and picturesque moment.

photo_EIIside.jpg.title: Elizabeth II - Side View
photo_EIIside.jpg.description: A historic sailing ship, the Elizabeth II, is docked on calm waters under a partly cloudy sky. The ship features multiple sails, some of which are hoisted, and is adorned with colorful flags. The boat's wooden hull and masts are clearly visible, and several people are aboard, likely enjoying the serene environment.

photo_horseherd.jpg.title: Brown Horse Herd
photo_horseherd.jpg.description: A group of brown horses with blonde manes and tails are seen running on a sandy beach. The horses are moving in a herd, with some of them partially submerged in the shallow water. The ocean waves are crashing onto the shore behind them, creating a dynamic and lively scene.

photo_foalsunset.jpg.title: Foal Resting at Sunset
photo_foalsunset.jpg.description: A brown horse and a foal are grazing on a sandy beach at sunset. The foal is resting on the sand, while the horse is bending down to eat grass. The light from the setting sun casts a warm glow over the scene, highlighting the golden hues of the sand and the rich brown color of the horses' coats.

photo_PoIchurch1.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Church #1
photo_PoIchurch1.jpg.description: A quaint, small church stands alone in a grassy field under a partly cloudy sky. The church features a steeple with a cross at the top, and its exterior is painted in white with green trim. The surrounding area is open and expansive, with a few trees visible in the background.

photo_PoIdunesmorn.jpg.title: Portsmouth Island Dunes in Morning Light
photo_PoIdunesmorn.jpg.description: A serene beach scene at dawn, with soft sand dunes covered in patches of grass. The sky is a gradient of blue, transitioning from a deep hue near the horizon to a lighter blue as it stretches upwards. The light is warm and golden, casting long shadows and highlighting the texture of the sand and grass.

photo_hattinletshoal.jpg.title: Hatteras Inlet Shoal
photo_hattinletshoal.jpg.description: Aerial view of a sandy shoreline with intricate patterns formed by the interplay of sand and water. The colors range from light beige to light green, suggesting a shallow, sandy area near the water's edge. The light is soft, indicating either early morning or late afternoon.

photo_sandfenceshadows.jpg.title: Sand Fence and Shadows
photo_sandfenceshadows.jpg.description: A close-up of a yellow fence post casting a shadow on a sandy beach, with diagonal stripes of blue sand and yellow fence creating a geometric pattern. The light suggests early morning or late afternoon, casting long shadows and warm tones.

photo_shipwrecklookout3.jpg.title: Shipwreck at Cape Lookout - #3
photo_shipwrecklookout3.jpg.description: A shipwreck lies on a sandy beach, its wooden planks weathered and twisted. The ocean waves gently lap against the shore, creating a serene and somewhat melancholic scene. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a calm day.

photo_shipwrecklookout4.jpg.title: Shipwreck at Cape Lookout - #4
photo_shipwrecklookout4.jpg.description: A shipwreck lies on a sandy beach, its wooden structure weathered and partially submerged in the sand. The ocean waves gently roll in the background, creating a serene and somewhat melancholic atmosphere. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a calm day.

photo_clightsnowV.jpg.title: Curritick Light in Snow - Vertical
photo_clightsnowV.jpg.description: A picturesque lighthouse stands prominently in the snowy landscape, its red brick structure contrasting with the white snow. The lighthouse is accompanied by a white, two-story house with a steeply pitched roof, both enveloped in a blanket of snow. The sky is a clear blue with a few scattered clouds, suggesting a cold, wintry day.

photo_chicamacomico.jpg.title: Chicamacomico Station
photo_chicamacomico.jpg.description: A picturesque coastal scene featuring a historic lifesaving station with a bell tower, surrounded by a white picket fence and lush greenery. The sky is partly cloudy, and the overall atmosphere is serene and inviting.

photo_geese.jpg.title: Snow Geese at Sunset 1972
photo_geese.jpg.description: A group of geese is silhouetted against a vibrant sunset, their wings spread wide as they fly in formation. The sun is setting in the background, casting a warm, golden light that contrasts sharply with the deep orange and yellow hues of the sky. The geese are in mid-flight, their bodies and wings creating dynamic shapes against the backdrop of the setting sun.

other_plungebasinlinville.jpg.title: Plunge Basin View of Linville Falls
other_plungebasinlinville.jpg.description: A cascading waterfall flows down a rocky cliff face, surrounded by lush greenery and autumnal trees. The water creates a misty effect as it falls, and the rocky terrain is adorned with patches of moss and lichen. The scene is bathed in natural light, highlighting the vibrant colors of the foliage and the rugged texture of the rocks.

other_appstream.jpg.title: Appalachain Stream
other_appstream.jpg.description: A vibrant stream flows swiftly over moss-covered rocks in a forested area, surrounded by lush greenery and autumn leaves. The water is clear, revealing the rocks beneath, and the scene is bathed in natural light, highlighting the rich colors of the foliage and the dynamic movement of the water.

other_redbarnblueridgesnow.jpg.title: Red Barn in Blue Ridge Snow
other_redbarnblueridgesnow.jpg.description: A red barn stands out against a snowy landscape, its vibrant color contrasting with the white snow and bare trees. The scene is bathed in soft, diffused light, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon, and the overall mood is serene and peaceful.

other_blueridgecrags.jpg.title: Blue Ridge Crags
other_blueridgecrags.jpg.description: A dramatic cliff face, partially obscured by clouds, stands tall against a dark sky. The rugged terrain is detailed with natural patterns and textures, suggesting a rocky outcrop or a cliff face in a remote location.

other_snowroanmtn.jpg.title: Snow on Roan Mountain
other_snowroanmtn.jpg.description: A snowy landscape with rocky outcrops and trees covered in snow. The sky is partly cloudy with patches of blue, and distant mountains are visible in the background.

other_OFatNight.jpg.title: Old Faithful at Night
other_OFatNight.jpg.description: A powerful geyser erupts from a hot spring, sending a thick plume of steam high into the night sky. The surrounding landscape is dark, with a few scattered stars visible, and the geyser's steam contrasts sharply against the dark backdrop. The scene is illuminated by the geyser's own light and the faint glow of the stars.

other_YSlandscape1.jpg.title: Yellowstone Landscape - 1
other_YSlandscape1.jpg.description: A serene landscape in Yellowstone National Park features a herd of bison grazing in a vast, open field. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, highlighting the golden hues of the grass and the rich green of the trees. Mist rises from a nearby hot spring, adding a mystical atmosphere to the tranquil setting.

photo_snowonbodieislandmarsh.jpg.title: Snow on Bodie Island Marsh
photo_snowonbodieislandmarsh.jpg.description: A snowy scene at Bodie Island Marsh, with snowflakes gently falling against a backdrop of reeds and grasses. The light is soft and diffused, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon, and the colors are muted, dominated by whites and grays.
